- [Platinum Security Glass Door - OVERSIZED](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/larson-platinum-security-oversized): Price includes door, handle, home delivery in the metro Denver, CO area, basic installation, and disposal of old door. Introducing the Larson Platinum Security Door, the new standard of innovation and security. This advanced storm door is designed to provide ultimate convenience and protection for your home. With its hidden top door closer, the Larson Platinum Storm Door offers a seamless and sleek appearance. This discreet feature ensures a smooth and controlled closing motion, enhancing the overall appeal of your home's exterior. When it comes to security, the Larson Platinum Storm Door is unparalleled. Equipped with a robust three-point locking system, this storm door offers maximum protection for your home and loved ones. The three-point locking system ensures that the door is firmly secured at multiple points, making it highly resistant to forced entry. And the Dominator™ secure glass keeps intruders out and shields against blunt or sharp objects without compromising your view; includes Break-In Protection. It's a true game-changer for homeowners seeking a functional and visually pleasing security door solution. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your home is fortified against potential intruders, even during severe weather conditions. The Larson Platinum Storm Door combines beauty, functionality, and security, making it the ideal choice for homeowners looking to enhance the value and safety of their property. Size: 36" x 96.5" and 32" x 96.5" Custom Sizes Available: Yes Swing: Left or Right Hinge NOTE: THESE DOORS ARE SPECIAL ORDER AND TAKE UP TO 60 DAYS TO BE MADE, SHIPPED, AND RECEIVED FROM THE FACTORY.

- [Easy Vent Double French Door](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/larson-easy-vent-french-door): Price includes door, handle, home delivery in the metro Denver, CO area, basic installation, and disposal of old door. Upgrade your home's entryway with the Larson Easy Vent Double Storm Door with Retractable Screen. This versatile and durable storm door is designed to enhance both the beauty and functionality of your home. Key Features: Retractable Screen: Enjoy fresh air without the hassle! The retractable screen allows for easy ventilation and disappears when not in use, providing a clear, unobstructed view. Double Door Design: Perfect for larger doorways, the double door design offers a grand entrance while providing maximum security and energy efficiency. Durable Construction: Made with high-quality materials, this storm door is built to withstand the elements, offering lasting protection against wind, rain, and debris. Easy Vent System: The innovative Easy Vent system lets you control the airflow into your home with ease, ensuring comfort in any season. Stylish and Functional: Available in multiple finishes and colors, this door complements any home's style while adding an extra layer of security and insulation. Transform your home's entrance with the Larson Easy Vent Double Storm Door with Retractable Screen. It’s more than just a door—it's an upgrade in comfort, style, and functionality. Order now to enjoy a more beautiful and energy-efficient home! Size: 64" x 80-81" and 72" x 80-81" Swing: Left or Right Operational Custom Sizes Available: Yes Overlapping frame with double weather strip seals out the weather and conceals hinges and gaps Screen Away® retractable screen disappears in the top cassette for a clear view EasyVent® balanced window system for easy one-hand operation Two closer systems: bottom closer features a Hold-Open button that holds the storm door open with the tap of a toe; top closer adds dependable opening and closing Bottom expander adjusts to uneven sills NOTE: ALL FRENCH DOORS ARE SPECIAL ORDER DUE TO THE CENTERPOST AND HEADER AND CAN TAKE 60 DAYS TO BE MADE, SHIPPED, AND RECEIVED FROM THE FACTORY.

- [ClearVue Double French Door](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/larson-clear-vue-double-door): Price includes door, handle, home delivery in the metro Denver, CO area, basic installation, and disposal of old door. Elevate your home's curb appeal with the Larson ClearVue Double French Storm Door, featuring a stunning full-glass design and an interchangeable screen. Perfect for showcasing your front door while providing superior protection and ventilation, this storm door is both stylish and practical. Key Features: Full Glass Design: The expansive full-glass panel allows for a clear, unobstructed view, making your entryway feel open and inviting while letting natural light pour into your home. Interchangeable Screen: Easily switch between the glass panel and the included screen to enjoy fresh air during warmer months without the worry of bugs or debris entering your home. Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, the Larson ClearVue Storm Door is built to resist harsh weather, providing reliable protection against wind, rain, and other elements. Enhanced Security: This door offers an additional layer of security with its robust frame and reinforced construction, giving you peace of mind without compromising style. Versatile Aesthetics: Available in a range of finishes, the Larson ClearVue complements any home’s exterior, enhancing both traditional and modern styles. Upgrade your home’s entryway with the Larson ClearVue Storm Door with Full Glass and Interchangeable Screen. It's the perfect blend of beauty, functionality, and durability, making it a must-have for homeowners looking to enhance their home’s appearance and comfort. Order yours today! Size: 64" x 80-81" and 72" x 80-81" Swing: Left or Right Operational Bottom closer features a Hold-Open button that holds the storm door open with the tap of a toe; top closer adds dependable opening and closing Bottom expander adjusts to uneven sills NOTE: ALL FRENCH DOORS ARE SPECIAL ORDER DUE TO THE CENTERPOST AND HEADER AND CAN TAKE UP TO 30-45 DAYS TO BE MADE, SHIPPED, AND RECEIVED FROM THE FACTORY.

- [Platinum ClearVue](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/larson-platinum-fullvue): Price includes door, handle, home delivery in the metro Denver, CO area, basic installation, and disposal of old door. Introducing the Larson Platinum ClearVue, the new standard of innovation and security. This advanced storm door is designed to provide ultimate convenience and protection for your home. With its hidden top door closer, the Larson Platinum Storm Door offers a seamless and sleek appearance. This discreet feature ensures a smooth and controlled closing motion, enhancing the overall appeal of your home's exterior. When it comes to security, the Larson Platinum Storm Door is unparalleled. Equipped with a robust three-point locking system, this storm door offers maximum protection for your home and loved ones. The three-point locking system ensures that the door is firmly secured at multiple points, making it highly resistant to forced entry. And the interchangeable glass or screen option ensures you get the most unobstructed view. It's a true game-changer for homeowners seeking a functional and visually pleasing security door solution. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your home is fortified against potential intruders, even during severe weather conditions. The Larson Platinum Storm Door combines beauty, functionality, and security, making it the ideal choice for homeowners looking to enhance the value and safety of their property. Size: 36" x 80-81" and 32" x 80-81" Custom Sizes Available: Yes Swing: Left or Right Hinge NOTE: THESE DOORS ARE SPECIAL ORDER AND TAKE UP TO 60 DAYS TO BE MADE, SHIPPED, AND RECEIVED FROM THE FACTORY.

- [Gibralter Steel Security Door](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/gibralter-steel-security-door): Enhance your home's safety and style with the Gibraltar Steel Security Door. Designed for maximum protection without sacrificing airflow, this steel security door is the perfect addition to any entryway. Key Features: Mesh Steel Screen with Diamond Vents: Enjoy the perfect balance of security and ventilation. The mesh steel screen with diamond vents allows fresh air to flow through while providing a strong barrier against intruders. Durable 2-Inch Welded Steel Core: Built with a robust 2-inch welded steel core and a maintenance-free powder-coated finish, this door is designed to withstand the elements and resist corrosion, ensuring long-lasting durability. Traditional Curved Security Grid: The heavy-duty steel grid not only adds an extra layer of security but also brings a touch of classic style to your entrance. Tamper-Resistant Features: Equipped with 4-inch one-way installation screws and hidden hinges, this door makes tampering and unwanted removal extremely challenging. The provided driver bit tool ensures an easy and secure installation. Overlapping Lockset Plate: The overlapping lockset plate is designed to make lock picking difficult, offering an additional layer of security to keep your home safe. Comes with a Kwikset Venetian Bronze door knob and deadbolt. Size: 36" x 80-81" and 32" x 80-81" Custom Sizes Available: No Swing: Left or Right Hinge NOTE: THIS DOOR IS DESIGNED TO KEEP PEOPLE OUT, BUT NOT BUGS. THERE WILL BE SLIGHT GAPPING AROUND THE DOOR DUE TO WELDED HINGES AND LACK OF WEATHERSTRIPPING. THIS IS MANUFACTURER DESIGN. 32" DOORS, CUSTOM SIZE, OR CUSTOM COLOR DOORS ARE SPECIAL ORDER AND TAKE UP TO 60 DAYS TO BE MADE, SHIPPED, AND RECEIVED FROM THE FACTORY.

- [Spectrum](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/spectrum): Price includes door, handle, home delivery in the metro Denver, CO area, basic installation, and disposal of your old door. Enjoy the best of both worlds—natural light and fresh air—without the hassle of removing and storing glass or screen panels. NOT AVAILABLE IN RETAIL STORES, The Spectrum storm door features a built-in InVent™ retractable screen that slides out of sight when not in use. Just lower the top window when you want airflow and raise it when you want a clear, unobstructed view. It's clean, easy, and perfect for Colorado’s changing seasons. Want a full view of your front door? Go with the full glass panel. Need more privacy or protection? Choose from three-quarter or half-view designs. This door also includes two closers for smooth, quiet operation. The bottom closer has a hands-free hold-open button—just tap it with your foot to keep the door open while carrying in groceries. Standard Specs: Sizes: 36" x 80–81" and 32" x 80–81" Custom Sizes Available: Yes Swing: Left or Right Hinge Style Options: Fullview Screen System: InVent™ retractable screen (top only) Aluminum Thickness: Up to 20% thicker than the industry standard Closers: Top and bottom closers. Bottom closer with foot-operated Hold-Open button Weather Sealing: Overlapping frame with double weatherstrip seals out wind, dust, and water Bottom Expander: Triple seal and adjusts to uneven sills for a better fit Customizable Options: Dual screen (top and bottom) ¾ view or half-view glass Aluminum Kick Panel: Reinforced and rust-resistant 30+ custom paint finishes available Glass Options: Decorative, privacy, and tinted glass choices available Design Help: Need something unique? Call us for custom designs Available in oversized 8' (96") heights and widths up to 42" wide NOTE:These doors are individually made-to-order and may take up to 45-60 days to be manufactured, shipped, and received from the factory.

- [DuraGuard Secure Screen](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/duraguard-secure-screen): DuraGuard heavy-duty screen doors are an excellent option for families seeking durable screen door solutions when pets or children reside in the home. With heavy-duty, non-removable, stainless steel screening, DuraGuard aluminum storm doors are available in a variety of styles, including full screens for maximum light and ventilation. These screen doors come in models that include removable glass inserts or self-storing screens, providing the level of convenience that best fits your lifestyle. Further customizations include a variety of paint colors, which are applied through an automated painting process that ensures a smooth and long-lasting finish. Like ProVia’s other storm door brands, DuraGuard screen doors feature an aluminum wall thickness that is 20% greater than industry standard. DuraGuard screen doors provide the right balance of security, aesthetics and function that many families need. Size: 36" x 81", 32" x 81", and 30" x 81" Custom Sizes Available: Yes Swing: Left or Right Hinge NOTE: THESE DOORS ARE SPECIAL ORDER AND TAKE UP TO 60 DAYS TO BE MADE, SHIPPED, AND RECEIVED FROM THE FACTORY.

- [Ring Elite Surface Mount Bracket for Exterior Mounting](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/ring-elite-surface-mount-bracket-for-exterior-mounting): /* Basic styling for readability - Standard Template v2 (Colors Updated) */ body { font-family: sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; margin: 20px; } h1, h2, h3 { color: #333; margin-top: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 0.6em;} h1 { font-size: 1.8em; } h2 { font-size: 1.4em; } h3 { font-size: 1.1em; } ul, ol { margin-left: 20px; padding-left: 1em; } li { margin-bottom: 8px; } strong { font-weight: bold; } em { font-style: italic; } /* Compatibility Alert Box Style - YELLOW */ .compatibility-alert { color: #8a6d3b; background-color: #fffacd; /* Light Yellow */ border: 1px solid #ffeeba; padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; border-radius: 5px;} .compatibility-alert h2 { color: #8a6d3b; margin-top: 0;} .compatibility-alert img { max-width: 150px; height: auto; vertical-align: middle; margin: 5px; border: 1px solid #ccc;} .important-note { color: #D8000C; font-weight: bold; } /* Dimensions Section - LIGHT BLUE */ .dimensions-section { background-color: #e7f5fe; /* Light Blue */ padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #bce8f1; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .dimensions-section h2 { color: #31708f; margin-top: 0; } .dimensions-section ul { list-style: disc; margin-top: 0.5em; } /* Installation Steps Style - LIGHT GREEN */ .installation-steps { background-color: #e6ffed; /* Light Green */ padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .installation-steps h2 { color: #155724; margin-top: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #c3e6cb; padding-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps ol { padding-left: 1.5em; margin-top: 1em;} .installation-steps li { margin-bottom: 1em; } .installation-steps ul { list-style-type: disc; margin-top: 0.5em; margin-left: 1em; padding-left: 1em;} .installation-steps ul li { margin-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps .step-note { margin-top: 0.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #000; padding: 10px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: block; } .warning-box strong { color: #721c24; } /* Standard Sections (Default Background) */ .product-info { margin-bottom: 20px; } .features ul { list-style: disc; } .benefits-section { margin-top: 20px; } .benefits-section h3 { color: #0056b3; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 5px; } .benefits-section p { margin-bottom: 1em; } /* Add-ons Section Style - LIGHT PURPLE */ .add-ons { background-color: #f2e7fe; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #d6bbf1; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .add-ons h2 { color: #563d7c; margin-top: 0; } .add-ons ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; } .add-ons li { border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; } .add-ons li:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; } .add-ons img { max-height: 100px; width: auto; max-width: 250px; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid #eee; vertical-align: middle; } .add-ons .addon-info { flex-grow: 1; } .add-ons .addon-info p { margin-top: 3px; font-size: 0.9em; } .add-ons a { text-decoration: none; color: #563d7c; font-weight: bold;} .add-ons a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; text-align: center; } .media-section h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #eee;} .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.9em; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Elite Surface Mount Box | Exterior Mounting Bracket Solution Compatibility: Ring Elite Doorbell ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Ring Elite Doorbell**. This model uses Power Over Ethernet (PoE) and typically requires a recessed single-gang electrical box. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Any other Ring doorbell model (Pro, Pro 2, Plus, Battery versions, Wired 2021, etc.). Please double-check your Ring model before ordering! This mount is specific to the Ring Elite. Mount Your Ring Elite Anywhere on a Flat Surface! The Ring Elite Doorbell normally requires a recessed single-gang electrical box for installation. But what if you don't have one, or can't install one where you need your doorbell? This **Surface Mount Box** is the perfect solution! It's specifically designed to securely hold your Ring Elite Doorbell on an exterior wall or other flat surface *without* needing to cut a hole for a recessed box. This functional and durable box provides the same standard "gang box" mounting interface your Ring Elite is designed for. Surface Mount Box Specifications Overall Dimensions: Designed to neatly house the base of the Ring Elite and cover a typical surface area for a clean installation. (Approx. [INSERT_X_DIM] H x [INSERT_Y_DIM] W x [INSERT_Z_DIM] D). Doorbell Mounting Interface: Features hole spacing identical to a standard single-gang electrical box, for perfect Ring Elite attachment. Wall Mounting: Pre-drilled holes on the back of the box allow secure attachment to your desired flat surface. Wire Passthrough: Rear opening for routing the Ethernet (PoE) cable to the Ring Elite. Ventilation: Includes bottom vents to allow moisture or heat to escape, protecting your device. Key Features & Benefits: Enables Surface Mounting for Ring Elite: Eliminates the need for a recessed gang box. Custom Fit for Ring Elite: Precision-designed for a secure and professional fit. Standard Gang Box Interface: Ring Elite attaches to this box just as it would to a standard in-wall box. Weather Resistant Design: Bottom vents help manage moisture and heat. Clean Cable Management: Allows Ethernet cable to pass through the back. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, impact-resistant, and UV-stable for outdoor use. Color Options: Default Black (matches Ring Elite often); other colors available via add-on. Mounting Hardware: Includes screws for attaching the Ring Elite to this surface box. (Screws for mounting the box to the wall are NOT included). Installing Your Ring Elite Surface Mount Box Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, appropriate screwdrivers/bits (for wall screws & Ring Elite screws), level, wall anchors (if needed), your Ring Elite and its Ethernet cable. Turn OFF power to the Ethernet port (PoE source) at your switch or injector! Prepare Wiring: Ensure your Ethernet cable is routed to the desired mounting location on the flat surface. Position & Mount Box to Wall: Pass the Ethernet cable through the large rear opening of the **Surface Mount Box**. Position the box on the wall, ensuring it's level. Securely attach the box to the wall using appropriate screws and anchors for your wall type (wall mounting screws/anchors NOT included) through the pre-drilled holes on the back of the box. Ensure box is firmly secured and flush against the wall. Connect & Mount Ring Elite: Connect the Ethernet cable to your Ring Elite doorbell. Align the Ring Elite with the gang-box-spaced mounting holes on the front of the Surface Mount Box. Secure the Ring Elite to the box using the machine screws typically provided **with your Ring Elite** for gang box installation, or use compatible screws if provided with this surface mount. Do not overtighten screws. Ensure a snug fit. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is securely attached. Restore power to the Ethernet port. Test your Ring Elite. Always follow electrical safety rules & Ring's specific guidelines for the Elite model. Choosing the correct wall fasteners for the surface mount box is crucial for a secure installation. Ring Elite Surface Mount Bracket: The Perfect Solution for Exterior Mounting Durable Construction for All Weather Conditions Made from high-quality PETG, the Ring Elite Surface Mount Bracket is built to endure various weather conditions. Because home security is paramount, this bracket is designed to withstand rain, snow, and sun, ensuring your Ring device remains functional year-round. Users can have peace of mind knowing that their surveillance is not interrupted by the elements. Easy Installation and User-Friendly Design This Surface Mount Box simplifies the Ring Elite installation where a recessed box isn't feasible. While it includes screws to attach your Elite to the box, you'll use your own appropriate hardware to secure the box to the wall. This design helps homeowners install their security devices quickly and correctly, reducing installation complexity. Optional Add-ons: Custom Color Want your surface mount box in White, Brown, Grey, or another color (instead of standard Black)? Add this item to your order. Product Visualization (See listing photos or contact us for images!) Questions About Compatibility or Installation? Unsure if this is the correct solution for your Ring Elite or have questions about surface mounting? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, please use the Color Change Request listing. Doorbell Not Included. This listing is for the Surface Mount Box and screws for attaching the Ring Elite to the box ONLY. Ring Elite doorbell and screws/anchors for mounting the box to the wall are NOT included. For Ring Elite Only: Specifically designed for the PoE Ring Elite model. 3D Printed Quality: Made from durable PETG. Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns. Order your Ring Elite Surface Mount Box today for a clean, professional installation without a recessed gang box!

- [No-Drill Adjustable Vinyl Siding Mount for Video Doorbells | Universal Fit Mount](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/no-drill-adjustable-vinyl-siding-mount-for-video-doorbells-universal-fit-mount): No-Drill Adjustable Vinyl Siding Mount for Video Doorbells |  Fit! Vinyl Siding Fit & Doorbell Model Selection Siding Compatibility: Designed with adjustable clips to securely fit most standard horizontal vinyl siding panels measuring between 3 inches and 5 inches in exposed width.  FIT: If this mount doesn't fit your 3"-5" vinyl siding, contact us with pictures! We'll work with you and send replacement parts if needed to ensure a fit, at no extra cost! Device Fit: You MUST CHOOSE your specific video doorbell model when ordering. We provide a custom-drilled top plate for a perfect, secure attachment. Compatible with many Ring, Nest, Eufy, Wyze, Blink, etc. models. Ideal for WIRELESS / BATTERY-POWERED Doorbells as this is a no-drill, surface-clip installation method. If your siding is outside the 3"-5" range, or if your model isn't listed, please contact us before ordering! Mount Your Video Doorbell on Vinyl Siding – Without Drilling Any Holes! Want a secure way to install your video doorbell on your home's vinyl siding without drilling, screws, or causing permanent damage? This innovative **Adjustable Vinyl Siding Mount** uses a clever clipping mechanism to attach firmly and safely between your siding panels. It's the perfect solution for a clean, damage-free installation, ideal for renters or any homeowner who wants to protect their vinyl siding. Get a secure mount and the perfect viewing angle without any destructive installation methods! How It Works: Simple & Secure Clipping Mechanism The top piece features a rotating clip that securely hooks into the horizontal seam (joint) at the bottom edge of a vinyl siding panel. The bottom piece is an adjustable hook that slides up snugly under the bottom lip of the same siding panel, creating tension. Both clips are locked into place with included screws to fit your specific siding panel width (from 3" to 5"). Included outdoor mounting tape can be applied to the hooks for enhanced grip and stability against the siding. Your selected doorbell attaches to a custom plate on the front of the mount. Key Features & Benefits: No-Drill, Damage-Free: Clips securely into siding panel joints – absolutely no screws into your vinyl! Adjustable for Most Siding: Fits standard horizontal vinyl siding panels with an exposed width of 3 inches to 5 inches.  Fit Promise: We'll ensure it fits your 3"-5" siding with free replacement parts if needed (contact us with pictures). Custom Doorbell Plate: Select your doorbell model for a pre-drilled plate, ensuring a perfect fit for your device. Secure Locking Design: Top clip screws in, bottom hook slides and can be secured with small side screws for a tight grip. Durable & UV-Resistant: Made from high-quality PETG material built to withstand outdoor conditions. Optional Fixed Angle: Need your doorbell angled? Contact us – this can often be added by request. Future-Proof System: The top adapter plate is replaceable if you change doorbell models later (available here). Clipping Vinyl Siding Mount Installation For assistance, TEXT photos to 833-326-6868. FREE REPLACEMENT if it doesn’t fit your 3"-5" vinyl – send pictures! Prepare: Unpack mount. Pull the bottom hook down slightly more than the width of one vinyl siding plank. Apply Tape (Optional but Recommended): Remove the protective covering from the mounting tape on the back of the bottom hook and the top hook area. (Extra tape may be included). Insert Top Hook: Ensure the top rotating clip is open (loose). At a horizontal vinyl siding joint/seam, insert the hook at the top of the mount into the crack at approximately a 45-degree angle upwards. It should slide in. As you rotate the mount downwards to sit flat against the siding, the hook will engage. If it doesn't fully insert, try applying slight upward pressure on the mount while it's halfway turned (about 15 degrees from horizontal) to help the hook catch the lip of the siding. Position & Secure Top Clip: Once the top hook is engaged and the mount is rotated flat against the siding, push the top clip piece fully IN towards the siding to secure the top hook's position. Insert and tighten the small **#4 x 1/4in screw (provided)** into the top clip to lock it. Ensure the mount is positioned where you want it before tightening this screw. Secure Bottom Hook: Slide the bottom hook firmly UPWARDS against the bottom lip of the same siding panel until there is a snug and secure fit. Optional Side Screws: If desired for extra security of the bottom hook's position, insert the small screws (provided) into the pilot holes on the sides of the bottom hook assembly. Tighten gently – these help prevent the bottom hook from sliding down. Mount Your Doorbell: Attach your specific video doorbell (using its custom adapter plate that came with this mount) to the front of the vinyl siding mount using the provided #4 screws. Ensure the mount is stable and secure before attaching your doorbell. Periodically check for tightness. Perfect Compatibility & Secure Mounting This vinyl siding mount, when your doorbell model is selected, ensures a snug and secure fit. Avoid worries about your doorbell coming loose – enjoy peace of mind with a reliable, purpose-built mounting solution designed for vinyl siding. Durable Design for Long-lasting Use Constructed with premium, weather-resistant PETG, this bracket is designed to endure rain, snow, sun, and varying temperatures without cracking or fading, ensuring it looks great and functions reliably for years. Customization Options: Need an Angle? If you need your doorbell angled, please contact us. We can often incorporate a fixed angle into this mount design by request. Custom Color Standard color is Black. For White, Grey, Brown, or other colors, please add this service to your order. See It In Action: Watch our general installation videos for vinyl siding mounts (specific model may vary): Installation Video Example 1 Installation Video Example 2 (Videos demonstrate the clipping concept for vinyl siding.) Fit Guarantee & Customization Questions? Remember to select your doorbell model! If the mount doesn't fit your 3"-5" siding as expected, contact us with pictures for your  Fit replacement. Interested in adding an angle or have other questions? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Typically Black. Use Color Change Request for other options. Doorbell Not Included. Kit includes adjustable vinyl siding clips and a custom-drilled top plate for your selected doorbell model, plus assembly screws. Siding Compatibility: Best for standard horizontal vinyl siding panels 3" to 5" wide. May not work with insulated, very thick, or uniquely shaped siding profiles outside this range without consultation. 3D Printed Quality: This mount is produced using 3D printing (PETG), resulting in a strong, functional part. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be visible but do not affect durability or function. Your satisfaction is  – please reach out with any concerns! Order your No-Drill Adjustable Vinyl Siding Mount today for a secure, damage-free installation backed by our Fit Guarantee! Don't forget to select your doorbell model.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px;} .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Vinyl Siding Mount for Ring Stick Up Cam | No-Drill, Adjustable Fit (3-5" Lap) Compatibility Check: For Ring Stick Up Cam & Specific Siding Camera Model: Designed exclusively for the Ring Stick Up Cam (Battery, Plug-In, Solar - all generations using the standard mounting base). It will NOT fit Ring Doorbells or other camera models. Siding Type: Works on most standard and Dutch lap vinyl siding panels where the exposed flat face (the "lap") measures between 3 inches and 5 inches tall. Please measure your siding lap exposure before ordering! Need help confirming? Send us a picture! Mount Your Ring Stick Up Cam Anywhere on Vinyl Siding - No Drilling Required! Finally, a secure way to mount your Ring Stick Up Cam exactly where you need it on your vinyl siding, without drilling any holes! This innovative bracket uses adjustable clips that slide securely under the siding seams, providing a stable platform for your camera anywhere on your wall. Secure Screwless Installation Method This mount cleverly avoids damaging your siding: The top clip rotates and slides under the upper siding panel's bottom edge. The bottom bracket slides up to grip the lower lip of the target siding panel. Adjusts to fit siding laps between 3 and 5 inches (fits ~98% of standard/Dutch lap siding). Set screws are included to lock the adjustable pieces firmly in place once fitted to your siding width. Included outdoor tape adds extra security to keep the bottom bracket from potentially slipping over time. Installation is quick and easy, requiring no special tools or drilling into your valuable siding! Key Features & Benefits: No Drilling Needed: Installs securely without screws into your vinyl siding, preventing damage. Perfect Fit for Ring Stick Up Cam: Designed specifically for the standard Stick Up Cam mounting base. Adjustable Siding Fit: Works on most vinyl siding with 3" to 5" lap exposure. Stable & Secure: Locking mechanism and included tape ensure a firm hold. Install Anywhere: Place your camera exactly where you need visibility. Wire Passthrough Option: Internal channel allows routing power cables for plug-in or solar Stick Up Cams. Durable PETG Construction: Made from strong, UV-resistant PETG plastic suitable for outdoor use. Color Options: Available in default Black or optional White. Our Fit Guarantee! We're confident this mount will fit vinyl siding with 3" to 5" exposure. However, if you encounter a fit issue, please contact us! Send us pictures showing the problem, and we will work with you and provide free replacement parts until we achieve a perfect fit. Your satisfaction is ! Optimal Fit for Your Vinyl Siding Designed specifically for 3-5 inch standard or Dutch lap vinyl siding, this mount attaches securely without drilling or extra tools. Enhance your home security easily without complicated steps. Convenience with Screwless Installation The standout screwless design makes installation incredibly convenient – simply clip it onto your siding seams. Preserve the integrity of your home’s exterior without creating damaging holes. Enhancing Your Home Security Easily install your Ring Stick Up Cam to monitor your property effectively. Proper camera placement provides peace of mind and acts as a deterrent. A smart choice for boosting home security. Installation Video (Video shows installation process) Questions About Fit, Siding Type, or Installation? Unsure if it will fit your siding? Need help with installation? Send us a picture of your siding and camera! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Standard Color: Black. Also available in White. About 3D Printed Quality: This mount is produced using 3D printing (PETG), resulting in a strong, functional part ideal for outdoor use. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be visible but do not affect durability or function. We stand by our quality – please reach out with any concerns! Order your No-Drill Vinyl Siding Mount for Ring Stick Up Cam today and easily enhance your home security!

DOORBELL IS NOT INCLUDED. (Click image to view the compatible Tapo D210 doorbell on Amazon. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Please confirm you have this exact doorbell model before purchasing this mount. The Smart Solution for Mounting Your Tapo D210 Near Brick Stop struggling with doorbell installations where trim sits behind protruding brick! This fixed extension mount is your answer. It extends your Tapo D210 doorbell outward, past the brick face, eliminating blocked views and tricky mounting challenges. Best of all, it saves you the time and effort of drilling into brick! This mount is also ideal if your doorbell's current position is too close to the door's swing path or if the brick itself obstructs the view of visitors or packages. Its "Full Offset" design shifts the doorbell horizontally for optimal placement. Key Features & Benefits: Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts securely to your existing trim location, no need to damage masonry. Custom Fit for Tapo D210: Precision engineered ONLY for the TP-Link Tapo D210 model. Clear Obstructions: Extends the doorbell past brickwork for an unobstructed camera view and easy button access. Full Offset Design: Moves the doorbell significantly over the brick and away from the door swing path. Improved Package/Visitor View: Get a better view of deliveries and approaching visitors without the brick blocking the picture. Narrow Profile (9/16"): Slim design fits easily onto most standard door trim widths. Hidden Wires: Features an internal channel to conceal wires within the narrow base for a clean look. Durable & Weather-Resistant: 3D printed from high-quality PETG material suitable for outdoor exposure. Perfect Fit for Brick Installations The TP-LINK Tapo D210 Doorbell Brick Extension is engineered specifically for installations near brick surfaces. With a sturdy 9/16 inch wide base, it ensures a secure fit on your trim, eliminating installation headaches. This extension allows your D210 Doorbell to sit proud of the brick, providing a seamless and professional look while the offset design helps accommodate the brick's protrusion. Easy Installation Process Installation is quick and hassle-free. Mount this extension to your existing doorbell spot on the trim – no specialized tools or masonry drilling needed! Its user-friendly approach means even DIY novices can install it confidently, positioning the doorbell perfectly. Durable and Weather-Resistant Design Designed to withstand various weather conditions, this brick extension protects your D210 Doorbell  from rain, snow, and sun. Built with durable materials, it ensures long-lasting performance and security for your home. Questions, Custom Needs, or Color Options? Need confirmation this mount is right for your setup? Require a different offset or extension length? Send us a picture of your mounting area! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Standard Color: This mount comes in Black. For other colors like White, Brown, or Silver, please use the Color Change Request listing or contact us directly. About 3D Printed Quality: Our 3D printing process produces strong, high-quality functional parts. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines, inherent to the technology, may be present but do not affect the mount's durability or function. Your satisfaction is  – please reach out with any concerns! Order your TP-Link Tapo D210 Narrow Offset Brick Extension Mount today for a cleaner look and better view, without drilling brick!

DOORBELL IS NOT INCLUDED. (Click image to view the compatible Tapo D230 doorbell on Amazon. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Please ensure you have this exact doorbell model before ordering this mount. Enhance Your Tapo Doorbell Experience with the D230 Brick Extension Mounting your Tapo D230 on trim recessed behind protruding brick? Need to move it away from the door's swing path or clear an obstructed view? This fixed extension mount is designed precisely for these situations, providing a clean installation without needing to drill into brick. It extends your Tapo D230 outward past the brick face and uses a "Full Offset" design to shift it horizontally over the brick, ensuring optimal visibility, accessibility, and a professional look. Key Features & Benefits: Avoid Drilling Brick: Installs easily onto your existing trim location, preserving your masonry. Custom Fit for Tapo D230: Engineered exclusively for a perfect fit with the TP-Link Tapo D230 doorbell. Clear Obstructions: Extends the doorbell beyond interfering brickwork for a clear camera view and easy access. Full Offset Advantage: Shifts the doorbell significantly over the brick surface and away from the door swing path. Narrow Profile (9/16"): Fits seamlessly onto most standard door trim. Clean Wire Management: Features an internal channel to neatly conceal doorbell wires. Durable & Weather-Resistant: Made from robust PETG material built for outdoor conditions. Enhances Curb Appeal: Provides a clean, integrated look for your smart doorbell installation. Convenient Brick Mounting Solution The TP-LINK Tapo Doorbell D230 Brick Extension makes installation easy, especially near brick surfaces. Its 9/16 inch wide base ensures a secure fit on your trim, so you don’t have to worry about instability. This extension offset allows the doorbell to sit perfectly past the side of the brick, giving you better visibility and easier access. Setting up your doorbell becomes a breeze! Versatile and Stylish Design Not just functional, this brick mounting extension also adds to the aesthetics of your home. The sleek design allows the Tapo Doorbell D230 to blend seamlessly with various architectural styles, enhancing your home's curb appeal. Many users appreciate how the offset feature positions the doorbell just right, ensuring visitors can easily see and use it, elevating your entryway with style. Reliable Functionality for Your Home Security Integrate your TP-LINK Tapo Doorbell D230 seamlessly into your home security system with this mount ensuring perfect positioning. Monitor your entrance effectively from anywhere, knowing your doorbell is optimally placed for maximum coverage and reliability, enhancing your peace of mind without compromising on style. - [Ring Battery Doorbell Pro Brick Extension Mount - 9/16in Wide - 5/8" Standard Offset](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/ring-battery-doorbell-pro-brick-extension-mount-9-16in-wide-5-8-standard-offset): This mount is a fixed Brick extension mount to Fit Ring PRO (also fit all Ring models with Removable Batteries including Ring 2/3/3+/4) NEWEST 2024 Doorbell Fits This Doorbell on Amazon ( link) Fits all doorbells with removable bottom cover and removable battery. Must remove cover to install doorbell to bracket. In cases where the doorbell is located behind a thick brick wall or other obstruction, the extension can be used to move the button or doorbell to a location where it is visible and opposite the door. It is available in various extension lengths. If you cant mount your doorbell flat, or if something is in the way of the view, you can use this mount to correct it. These mounts allow for wires to pass through the center. The Standard Offset of 5/8" leaves about 5/8in gap on door side. (5/8" Offset means the center of the doorbell is offset 5/8in over the brick side which is for most smaller doorbells, mostly offsets the doorbell over the brick, so it is a more universal base for the brick extensions we ) Full Offset is flush with door side. For example See picture Below. Click the picture to be taken to the full offset listing for the Ring Plus If you dont need the full offset and you want an extension that is about $10 cheaper the standard offset leaves about 5/8in on the door side. The listing can be found by clicking the picture below: If you have angled trim you can get angled shims to make sure your brick extension is perpendicular: If you have a gap where you hole for your doorbell wire is far from your brick, you have a few options. You can 1. Install a Bottom Filler Spacer Plate - Also Correct Angled Trim too in Combination. 2. Provide a bottom Mouse Hole in the Brick Extension 3. Add Body Shim Filler Plate This Mount fits this Doorbell found on Amazon ( link below) NORMAL COLOR is Black, if you need to purchase a different color, there will be a color change request listing to change the color. Extension Mount for Your Ring Doorbell Pro Be sure to send me a picture of your doorbell and where you want to mount it. Message me by email at shop@doorbellmount.com or text me at 833-326-6868. All my mounts have holes to allow for wire passthrough. ****While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, there are often imperfections that may be found on the prints. These do not impair the function and rarely affect the aesthetics. But if your not happy with the quality, please text, email, or message me before leaving a review. Perfect Fit for Brick Walls The Ring Battery Doorbell Pro Brick Extension Mount is an essential accessory for your home security setup. This extension mount is specifically designed to fit standard brick wall offsets of 5/8 inches. It allows you to easily mount your Ring doorbell in the ideal position, so you can capture a clear view of visitors at your door. Because it is 9/16 inches wide, it also blends seamlessly with your home’s exterior without being too obtrusive. Simple Installation Process Installing the extension mount is straightforward and user-friendly. Unlike other complex mounting solutions, this extension mount is made for quick installation. You’ll find that setting up your doorbell with this mount takes just a few minutes, so you can start using your doorbell right away. However, ensure you follow the installation instructions carefully to achieve the best results. This simplicity makes it a popular choice for homeowners who want to enhance their home security. Durability and Design Not only does this extension mount provide functionality, but it also boasts a durable design that resists the elements. Made from high-quality materials, it can withstand various weather conditions, ensuring that your Ring doorbell remains securely in place. This durability means you won't have to worry about frequent replacements. Therefore, investing in the Ring Battery Doorbell Pro Brick Extension Mount is wise for long-term home security solutions.

- [Narrow Offset Doorbell Brick Extension Mount| TP-LINK Tapo D225 Doorbell |Offset Extend Over Side of Brick](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/narrow-offset-doorbell-brick-extension-mount-tp-link-tapo-d225-doorbell-offset-extend-over-side-of-brick): /* Basic styling for readability */ body { font-family: sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; margin: 20px; } h1, h2, h3 { color: #333; margin-top: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 0.6em;} h1 { font-size: 1.8em; } h2 { font-size: 1.4em; } h3 { font-size: 1.1em; } ul { margin-left: 20px; list-style: disc;} li { margin-bottom: 8px; } strong { font-weight: bold; } em { font-style: italic; } .warning { color: #D8000C; background-color: #FFD2D2; padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid #D8000C; text-align: center; border-radius: 5px;} .product-info { margin-bottom: 20px; } .features ul { padding-left: 20px; } .user-content h3 { margin-top: 1.5em; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 5px;} .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px;} .-link { font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; margin-top: 5px;} .model-image img { max-width: 180px; height: auto; display: block; margin: 10px auto; } /* Centered image */ .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Narrow Offset Brick Extension Mount for TP-Link Tapo D225 | Avoid Drilling Brick IMPORTANT: Compatibility Check This mount is precision-designed to fit ONLY the TP-LINK Tapo D225 video doorbell. DOORBELL IS NOT INCLUDED. (Click image to view the compatible Tapo D225 doorbell on Amazon. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Please ensure you have this exact doorbell model before ordering this mount. Enhance Your Home Security with the Tapo D225 Doorbell Mount Installing your TP-Link Tapo D225 on trim that sits behind protruding brick? Need to improve the camera's view past the brick or move the doorbell away from your door's swing path? This fixed extension mount is the perfect solution, allowing for a clean installation without drilling into your brickwork. It's specifically designed to extend your Tapo D225 outward and uses a "Full Offset" design to shift it horizontally over the brick face. This ensures better visibility of visitors and packages, easier access, and a professional finish. Key Features & Benefits: Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts securely to your existing trim location, preserving your masonry. Custom Fit for Tapo D225: Exclusively engineered for a perfect fit with the TP-Link Tapo D225 doorbell. Clear Obstructions: Extends the doorbell past interfering brickwork for an unobstructed camera view and easy button access. Full Offset Advantage: Significantly shifts the doorbell over the brick surface and away from the door swing path. Improved Package/Visitor View: Enhances visibility for better monitoring of deliveries and approaching guests. Narrow Profile (9/16"): Slim design fits easily onto most standard door trim. Hidden Wire Channel: Features an internal channel within the narrow base to conceal wires neatly. Durable & Weather-Resistant: 3D printed using high-quality PETG material suitable for outdoor exposure. Easy Installation with Brick Mounting The Tapo D225 brick extension mount is designed for easy installation on trim near brick surfaces. Its 9/16 inch wide base ensures a secure fit on your trim, making it perfect for homes with brick exteriors. You won't have to worry about complicated setups; simply mount the extension to your wall, attach the doorbell, and enjoy the convenience. Because the base extends over the side of the brick, it allows for optimal positioning and functionality while eliminating common installation difficulties. Durable Design for Outdoor Use Durability is crucial for outdoor devices, and this D225 mount delivers. Made from high-quality materials, it withstands various weather conditions, ensuring your home’s security remains intact regardless of rain, snow, or extreme heat. Since the mount is built for resilience, you can trust it to function properly over time, providing safety and convenience without frequent replacements. Smart Features for Modern Homes This mount ensures your Tapo D225 doorbell is positioned perfectly to take full advantage of its smart features. Optimal placement allows for better motion detection and clearer views for remote access and monitoring via your smart home system. Receive alerts on your smartphone knowing your doorbell has the best possible vantage point, enhancing your home's security and connectivity. Questions, Custom Needs, or Color Options? Need to verify this is the right mount for your specific setup? Interested in a different offset, extension length, or color? Send us a picture of your mounting area! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Standard Color: This mount comes in Black. For other colors like White, Brown, or Silver, please use choose the correct color from the dropdown. About 3D Printed Quality: Our 3D printing process produces strong, high-quality functional parts. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines, inherent to the technology, may be visible but do not affect the mount's durability or function. Your satisfaction is  – please reach out with any concerns! Order your TP-Link Tapo D225 Narrow Offset Brick Extension Mount today for a seamless installation and improved view!

- [Narrow Offset Doorbell Brick Extension Mount |TP-LINK Tapo Doorbell D130 | Solve Recessed Trim Mounting](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/narrow-offset-doorbell-brick-extension-mount-tp-link-tapo-doorbell-d130-solve-recessed-trim-mounting): /* Basic styling for readability */ body { font-family: sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; } h1, h2, h3 { color: #333; margin-top: 1em; margin-bottom: 0.5em;} ul { margin-left: 20px; list-style: disc;} li { margin-bottom: 8px; } strong { font-weight: bold; } em { font-style: italic; } .warning { color: #D8000C; background-color: #FFD2D2; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border: 1px solid #D8000C; text-align: center;} .product-info { margin-bottom: 15px; } .features ul { padding-left: 20px; } .contact-info { margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #eee; background-color: #f9f9f9;} .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 15px;} .-link { font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; margin-top: 5px;} .model-image img { max-width: 150px; height: auto; display: block; margin: 10px auto; } /* Centered image */ Narrow Offset Brick Extension Mount for TP-Link Tapo D130 | Solve Recessed Trim Mounting IMPORTANT: Compatibility Check This mount is precision-designed to fit ONLY the TP-LINK Tapo D130 video doorbell. DOORBELL IS NOT INCLUDED. (Click image to view the compatible Tapo D130 doorbell on Amazon. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Please ensure you have this exact doorbell model before ordering. Problem Solved: Mounting Your Tapo D130 on Recessed Trim Near Brick Is your doorbell mounting spot located on trim that sits behind a protruding brick wall? Is your doorbell mounted too close to where your door swings open, risking damage? Or is the brick obstructing the camera's view? This Narrow Offset Brick Extension Mount is the perfect solution! Specifically engineered for the Tapo D130, this mount extends your doorbell outward, past the interfering brickwork. Its "Full Offset" design also shifts the doorbell horizontally away from the door frame/swing path and over the brick face, ensuring better visibility, accessibility, and protection. Key Features & Benefits: Custom Fit for Tapo D130: Guarantees a secure and precise fit for your TP-Link Tapo D130 doorbell. Brick Extension Design: Bridges the gap between recessed trim/mounting surfaces and the face of your brickwork. Full Offset Advantage: Moves the doorbell significantly over the brick and away from the door swing path for optimal placement and view. Narrow Profile: At only 9/16 inches wide, it fits easily onto most trim and narrow mounting areas. Clean Wiring: Features a central channel to allow doorbell wires to pass through cleanly for a tidy installation. Improved View & Access: Positions your doorbell clear of obstructions for a better camera view and easier button access. Durable for Outdoor Use: 3D printed from high-quality, weather-resistant PETG material designed to last. Easy Installation: Mounts securely to your existing doorbell location on the trim. Enhance Your Home with the Tapo Doorbell D130 Brick Extension This extension simplifies installing your Tapo D130 on challenging surfaces like brick-adjacent trim. Many homeowners find it difficult to mount doorbells securely in these situations, but this extension ensures a perfect, stable fit for reliable performance. Durable Design for Long-lasting Use Crafted from robust materials, the Tapo D130 Brick Extension withstands various weather conditions, ensuring your doorbell remains secure and functional year-round, whether rain or shine. Perfect for Smart Home Integration As a custom accessory for your Tapo Doorbell, this extension seamlessly integrates into your smart home security setup, ensuring reliable operation and enhancing the convenience and peace of mind your system provides. Need Help or Customization? Unsure if this is the right mount? Need a different offset distance, extension length, or color? Send a picture of your doorbell area! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Color Note: The standard color is Black. 3D Printing Quality: While our 3D printing delivers excellent, functional parts, minor cosmetic variations or layer lines inherent to the process may be visible. These do not affect the mount's strength or function. Your satisfaction is  – please contact us with any concerns! Order your TP-Link Tapo D130 Narrow Offset Brick Extension Mount today and achieve the perfect installation!

padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; } .add-ons li:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; } .add-ons img { max-height: 100px; width: auto; max-width: 250px; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid #eee; vertical-align: middle; } .add-ons .addon-info { flex-grow: 1; } .add-ons .addon-info p { margin-top: 3px; font-size: 0.9em; } .add-ons a { text-decoration: none; color: #563d7c; font-weight: bold;} .add-ons a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 5px; background-color: #fafafa;} .media-section h2 { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; padding-bottom: 0.5em;} .media-section img, .media-section iframe { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #ccc;} .media-section .image-gallery { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .media-section .image-gallery img { max-width: 198px; flex: 0 1 198px;} .media-section a { display: block; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; } /* Contact Info Box Style (Light Grey) */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount for Video Doorbells (Select Your Model) Select Your Doorbell Model for a Perfect Fit! This mount is compatible with many popular video doorbell brands like Ring, Eufy, Nest, Wyze, Blink, Reolink, Lorex, Google Nest, and more! CRITICAL: You MUST select your specific doorbell model from the options provided on this page. We will send the correct adapter bracket pre-drilled for your chosen model. Intended Use: For mounting on trim/surfaces recessed behind brickwork to bring the doorbell forward AND provide a standard 5/8" sideways offset. Is your model not listed or are you unsure? Please contact us (email/text) with a picture of your doorbell before ordering! (Contact info below) Need help identifying a Ring model? Check our Ring Model Guide. Solve Recessed Doorbell Problems with Our Popular Standard Offset Extension! Is your video doorbell installed on trim that's sunk behind your beautiful brick or stone? Does this make it hard to see, reach, or get a good camera angle? Our Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount is the perfect solution for countless homeowners facing this common problem, especially when a new storm door causes interference! This mount installs securely on your existing trim, extends your doorbell forward to clear the obstruction, and provides our standard 5/8" sideways offset – all without needing to drill into your masonry. It's designed to work with a wide variety of doorbell models (just select yours from the options!). How it Works: Standard 5/8" Offset Extension This mount features our widely compatible STANDARD OFFSET. The center of the doorbell mounting plate is offset approximately 5/8 inches horizontally towards the brick/siding side, relative to the center of the extension base (typically 9/16" wide). This usually leaves about 3/8 inch of the base visible on the side closest to the door frame (depending slightly on the doorbell width). It effectively moves most doorbells partially over the adjacent brick or siding, providing good  and an improved viewing angle for many situations. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face, not flush with it. Standard Offset (This Product) vs Full Offset: Need Maximum Sideways  (doorbell edge flush with mount)? Click here to see our Full Offset versions. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The standard mounting base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing on the base is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure adequate flat mounting surface on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your mounting trim surface is angled and not perpendicular to the wall, add our Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15° Options) to your order for a perfect vertical installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choosing the correct extension length ensures the mount clears your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture of your setup! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Versatile Compatibility (Select Model): Fits many popular doorbell models – just select yours! Standard Offset Design (5/8"): Provides effective sideways offset for most common installation scenarios. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it partially over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts easily to your existing trim behind brickwork (Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Custom Extension Lengths: Order the precise depth needed based on your trim-to-brick-face measurement. Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Fits most standard trim widths (requires >= 9/16" surface). Clean Installation: Internal channel allows routing wires if needed. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic for outdoor use. Expandable: Fully compatible with our range of add-on accessories (see below). Future-Proof System: The base is often universal! If you upgrade your doorbell, you may only need a new adapter bracket (available here, approx. $10). How to Install Your Brick Extension Mount This mount consists of two main pieces: the Extension Base (mounts to wall) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (holds the doorbell). Prepare Tools & Area: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed for wall). Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on your trim over wires. Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Drill pilot holes if needed. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for your selected model). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear any plastic debris in pilot holes. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Applicable): Connect wires to your doorbell following its manufacturer's instructions. Tuck excess wire into base cavity. Mount Doorbell onto Adapter Bracket: Attach your video doorbell to the **Doorbell Adapter Bracket**. The method depends on your specific doorbell model: Some doorbells (like Ring Gen 2 Battery, Nest Hello/Battery, Eufy Single Cam, Lorex) use their **own plastic/metal backplate**. Screw this backplate onto our Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4/PH1). Then, clip/attach your doorbell to its backplate. Other doorbells (like Ring Wired 2021, or models without a separate plate) may screw **directly** onto our Adapter Bracket using the screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT. Some Ring models (like Removable Battery Series 2/3/4/Plus/Pro, or Ring Pro/Wired Plus) attach to our Adapter Bracket using screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT, then their faceplate is secured with Ring's security screws. Always use the correct screws provided by *us* for attaching the doorbell/its plate to *our* adapter bracket. DO NOT use the long wall-mounting screws from your doorbell manufacturer for this. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & your doorbell's guidelines. Use appropriate anchors/screws. Correct Philips bit size prevents stripping. Discover the Benefits of the Brick Extension Versatile Applications of Brick Extension The Brick Extension is designed to enhance the versatility of your mounting solutions. It allows you to securely attach your doorbell to trim near brick surfaces, making it perfect for overcoming obstructions and achieving optimal placement. Because it is 9/16 inch wide and crafted with a standard offset, this mount accommodates various applications. Durability and Reliability You Can Trust Durability is a key feature of the Brick Extension Mount. Made from robust PETG, this mount can withstand the elements and resist wear over time. So, whether installing outdoors or in a challenging spot, you can be confident that it will hold up, saving you time and money in the long run. Easy Installation Process Installing the Brick Extension is straightforward. With the right tools, you can easily attach it to your existing trim. The mount’s user-friendly design ensures that you won’t struggle with complicated instructions, making your home improvement tasks more enjoyable. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Questions? Need Help Selecting Your Model or Options? We're here to help! If you're unsure about your doorbell model, need a custom solution, or your model isn't listed, please reach out: Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text pictures!) Standard Color: Ships in Black. For other colors, please purchase the separate Color Change Request listing along with this mount. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket for your selected model) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order your Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount today! Remember to select your doorbell model and carefully measure (Trim to Brick Face!) for the required extension length.

- [Wyze Pro Doorbell Brick Extension - Narrow Base  - Offset Extend Over Brick](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/wyze-pro-doorbell-brick-extension-narrow-base-offset-extend-over-brick): Wyze Pro Doorbell Brick Extension for Enhanced Flexibility This mount is a fixed extension mount to extend past the brick in narrow spots where either the doorbell will not fit, or the view is partially blocked by the bricks. This mount will also get the doorbell to have a better view of packages and people coming to the door without the brick blocking it. Also saves time and effort not having to drill into the brick. The mount is specifically deisgned to fit the Wyze Pro Doorbell. Wires are neatly hidden on the inside of the narrow base.: This mount is a Brick extension mount for Wyze PRO Doorbell ONLY. or ROKU Smart Home Wireless Doorbell (doorbell not included) In cases where the doorbell is located behind a thick brick wall or other obstruction, the extension can be used to move the button or doorbell to a location where it is visible and opposite the door. It is available in various extension lengths. If you cant mount your doorbell flat, or if something is in the way of the view, you can use this mount to correct it. These mounts allow for wires to pass through the center. This Mount fits this Doorbell found on Amazon ( link below) CHOOSE YOUR EXTENSION LIST FROM OPTIONS -- SMALLEST IS 1/4in. PICTURE MAY NOT BE OF DOORBELL LISTED IN TITLE. BRACKET WILL ONLY FIT DOORBELL LISTED IN THE TITLE OF LISTING. This is made to put the doorbell past the bricks if your doorbell is mounted to trim. It offsets the doorbell over the bricks and away from the door. So if doorbell is too close to the swing of the door, this is what you will need.(PICTURE OF DOORBELL MAY NOT MATCH THE DOORBELL MODEL SHOWN ON THE LISTING - DOORBELL NOT INCLUDED, THIS LISTING IS MADE TO FIT THE DOORBELL MODEL IN THE TITLE OF THIS LISTING ONLY This mount is 9/16in wide, and will fit in most spots. This is a OFFSET - that moves the doorbell the over the brick and away from the door. I have options to fully offset the doorbell all the way to the edge of the mount if necessary. NORMAL COLOR is Black, if you need to purchase a different color, there will be a color change request listing to change the color. Be sure to send me a picture of your doorbell and where you want to mount it. Also just because your doorbell is a wired doesn’t mean it will fit ring wired 2021 Ring has more than 7 different models all with confusing names. Message me by email at shop@doorbellmount.com or text me at 833-326-6868. All my mounts have holes to allow for wire passthrough. ****While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, there are often imperfections that may be found on the prints. These do not impair the function and rarely affect the aesthetics. But if your not happy with the quality, please text, email, or message me before leaving a review. Designed for Brick Surfaces The Wyze Pro Doorbell Brick Extension is specifically engineered for those challenging installations on brick surfaces. This narrow base design provides the perfect offset to ensure your doorbell is both functional and aesthetically pleasing. With this extension, you can easily mount your Wyze Pro Doorbell at the ideal height, making it more accessible for use. Moreover, it solves common installation issues typically faced when trying to secure doorbells to uneven surfaces like brick. Easy Installation Process Installing the Wyze Pro Doorbell Brick Extension is straightforward and user-friendly. The package includes all necessary components and step-by-step instructions, making it accessible for DIY enthusiasts. Whether you're a seasoned expert or a beginner, you will find that the process is simple and quick. Plus, the extension's design allows for flexibility during installation, helping you achieve the perfect placement for your doorbell. Enhanced Security and Coverage When you elevate your Wyze Pro Doorbell with this extension, you improve not only its visibility but also its functionality. A well-placed doorbell can make a significant difference in your home security. The Wyze Pro offers advanced features like motion detection and video recording, and when paired with the brick extension, you can ensure it captures all action outside your doorstep. This way, you can feel secure knowing that your property is under constant watch.

border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .offset-explained h2, .offset-explained h3 { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .offset-explained .base-specs { font-size: 0.95em; margin-top: 15px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc;} .positioning-note { font-style: italic; color: #555; margin-top: 5px;} .offset-comparison img { max-width: 324px; height: auto; display: block; margin: 10px auto; border: 1px solid #ddd;} .offset-comparison p { text-align: center; font-size: 0.9em; } /* Standard Section Styles */ .features ul { list-style: disc; } /* Add-ons Section Style */ .add-ons { margin-top: 25px; padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; } .add-ons h2 { margin-top: 0; } .add-ons ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; } .add-ons li { border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; } .add-ons li:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; } .add-ons img { max-height: 80px; width: auto; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid #eee; vertical-align: middle; /* Align images better */} .add-ons .addon-info { flex-grow: 1; text-align: center; } .media-section h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px 0; } .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; } /* Contact Info Box Style */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px;} .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Gen 2 (2020) Standard Offset Brick Extension | Ultra-Narrow 9/16" Base Compatibility Check: Specific Ring Model & Narrow Trim Required! Device: Fits ONLY the Ring Video Doorbell (2020 Release / Generation 2) with integrated battery (charges via orange button on back). (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Surface Width: Requires a mounting surface (trim/molding) that is AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide. Fits surfaces 9/16" or wider, but CANNOT fit surfaces narrower than 9/16". Intended Use: Mounting on narrow trim (9/16" minimum) recessed behind brickwork to bring the doorbell forward AND shift it sideways with a **Standard (5/8") Offset**. WILL NOT FIT: Other Ring models OR trim narrower than 9/16". Need help identifying your Ring model? Check our Ring Model Guide blog post or contact us with a picture! Mount Your Ring Gen 2 on Narrow Trim (9/16" Minimum) with Standard Offset! Have narrow brick molding or trim (at least 9/16-inch wide) next to your door? This specialized Ultra-Narrow Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount allows you to securely mount your Ring Video Doorbell (2020 / Gen 2) in these tight spots. It extends your doorbell forward past the brick and provides our standard 5/8" sideways offset, positioning the doorbell partially over the adjacent brick or siding. How it Works: Standard Offset (5/8") vs. Full Offset This mount features our STANDARD OFFSET, which measures approximately 5/8 inches from the center of the base to the center of the doorbell. This typically leaves about 7/16 inches of the 9/16" base visible on the side closest to the door frame. This provides a good amount of offset for many situations. If you need the absolute maximum sideways  (aligning the doorbell edge with the base edge), consider our "Full Offset" version. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face, not flush with it. Standard Offset (This Product) vs Full Offset: Need Maximum ? Click here for the Full Offset version. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The mounting base itself is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is typically 2.5 inches (center-to-center) - please verify if critical. Ensure your trim provides a solid mounting surface. Use appropriate screws for your trim material (not included). Angled Trim? If your mounting trim surface is angled, add our Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15° Options) to your order for a perfect vertical installation (ensure shim width is compatible or contact us). CRITICAL: Measure for Your OFFSET Extension Length! Choosing the correct extension length ensures the mount clears your brickwork, allowing the offset bracket to properly position your doorbell over the brick face. Please measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your >=9/16" trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for this Offset mount type). This length ensures the extension arm reaches the brick face, allowing the standard offset bracket to position your doorbell correctly. Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. We offer various lengths to suit your needs. Need help measuring? Text or email us a picture of your setup! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Ultra-Narrow Base: Fits on trim/surfaces 9/16 inches wide or wider. Standard Offset Design (5/8"): Provides significant sideways offset for many common situations. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it partially over the brick face. Exact Fit for Ring Gen 2 (2020): Custom molded for this specific Ring model (Integrated Battery). Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to your existing narrow trim (Std. 2.5" hole spacing likely). Custom Extension Lengths: Order the precise depth needed based on your trim-to-brick-face measurement. Clean Installation: Internal channel allows routing wires if needed. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic for outdoor use. Compatible with Add-ons: Works with angle shims, angle adapters, fillers etc. (see below). Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim to ensure your extension points straight out. Select the angle needed. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Need to angle your doorbell horizontally at the end of the extension? Add a fixed angle adapter or a fully adjustable swivel piece. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap between the bottom of the extension base and angled trim or uneven surfaces for a cleaner look. Can be combined with angle shims. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the side of the extension body and uneven brickwork for a more integrated appearance. Add Bottom Mouse Hole Wire Entry Need wires to enter from the bottom/side of the extension base instead of straight through the back? Add this modification. Product Images (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Questions About Compatibility, Measuring, or Add-ons? Verify your Ring model and confirm your trim is at least 9/16" wide! Need help measuring, choosing between Standard/Full Offset, or selecting add-ons? Send us pictures! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Standard Color: Black. Need a different color? Please use the Color Change Request listing. About 3D Printed Quality: This mount is produced using 3D printing (PETG), resulting in a strong, functional part ideal for outdoor use. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be visible but do not affect durability or function. Your satisfaction is  – please reach out with any quality concerns before leaving a review! Solve your narrow mounting challenge! Order the specialized Ultra-Narrow Standard Offset Brick Extension for your Ring Gen 2 (2020) today. Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.
