} Ring Gen 2 (2020) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Ultra-Narrow 9/16" Base Compatibility Check: Specific Ring Model & Narrow Trim Requirements Device: Fits ONLY the Ring Video Doorbell (2020 Release / Generation 2) with internal battery. (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Surface Width: Requires a mounting surface (trim/molding) that is AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide. It fits surfaces 9/16" or wider, but CANNOT fit surfaces narrower than 9/16". Intended Use: Mounting on narrow trim (9/16" minimum) recessed behind brickwork to bring the doorbell forward AND shift it sideways with maximum ("Full") offset. WILL NOT FIT: Other Ring models OR trim narrower than 9/16". Need help identifying your Ring model? Check our Ring Model Guide blog post or contact us with a picture! Mount Your Ring Gen 2 on Narrow Trim (9/16" Minimum)! Have narrow brick molding or trim (at least 9/16-inch wide) next to your door where standard mounts are too bulky? This specialized Ultra-Narrow Full Offset Brick Extension Mount is purpose-built for these tight situations, allowing you to securely mount your Ring Video Doorbell (2020 / Gen 2). Its unique "Full Offset" design provides maximum  from your door swing, making installation possible even in extremely confined spaces. How it Works: Full Offset for Maximum  This mount utilizes our FULL OFFSET design. Unlike standard offset mounts (which leave about 5/8" of the base visible beside the doorbell), the Full Offset aligns the door-side edge of your Ring Gen 2 doorbell flush with the edge of the narrow mount base. This pushes the entire doorbell as far sideways as possible over the adjacent brick/siding, maximizing  – essential when your door swing is very close to the mounting trim. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face, not flush with it. Full Offset vs Standard Offset: Need less offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version (requires wider trim). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The mounting base itself is 9/16 inches wide (minimum required surface width). Due to the narrow width, specific screw placement is required; ensure your 9/16" or wider trim provides a solid mounting surface. Contact us with questions about screw placement for this specific base. Screws suitable for your surface material are recommended (not typically included). Angled Trim? If your mounting trim surface is angled, add our Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15° Options) to your order for a perfect vertical installation (ensure shim width is compatible or contact us). CRITICAL: Measure for Your OFFSET Extension Length! Choosing the correct extension length ensures the mount clears your brickwork, allowing the offset bracket to properly position your doorbell over the brick face. Please measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your >=9/16" trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for this Offset mount type). This length ensures the extension arm reaches the brick face, allowing the full offset bracket to position your doorbell correctly. Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. We offer various lengths to suit your needs. Need help measuring? Text or email us a picture of your setup! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Ultra-Narrow Base: Fits on trim/surfaces 9/16 inches wide or wider. Full Offset Design: Maximizes sideways offset for tight door clearances. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it over the brick face. Exact Fit for Ring Gen 2 (2020): Custom molded for this specific Ring model. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to your existing narrow trim. Custom Extension Lengths: Order the precise depth needed based on your trim-to-brick-face measurement. Clean Installation: Internal channel allows routing wires if needed. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic for outdoor use. Compatible with Add-ons: Works with angle shims, angle adapters, fillers etc. (see below). Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim to ensure your extension points straight out. Select the angle needed. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Need to angle your doorbell horizontally at the end of the extension? Add a fixed angle adapter or a fully adjustable swivel piece. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap between the bottom of the extension base and angled trim or uneven surfaces for a cleaner look. Can be combined with angle shims. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the side of the extension body and uneven brickwork for a more integrated appearance. Add Bottom Mouse Hole Wire Entry Need wires to enter from the bottom/side of the extension base instead of straight through the back? Add this modification. Questions About Compatibility, Measuring, or Add-ons? Verify your Ring model and confirm your trim is at least 9/16" wide! Need help measuring or choosing add-ons? Send us pictures! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Standard Color: Black. Need a different color? Please purchase the separate "Color Change Request" listing along with this mount. About 3D Printed Quality: This mount is produced using 3D printing (PETG), resulting in a strong, functional part ideal for outdoor use. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be visible but do not affect durability or function. Your satisfaction is  – please reach out with any quality concerns before leaving a review! Don't let ultra-narrow trim stop your Ring Gen 2 installation! Order this specialized Full Offset Brick Extension today. Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

} .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Slim Trim Doorbell Mount (3/4" Base) with 90° Swivel Adjustment | Select Model Narrow Base Fit & Model Selection Required! This articulating mount includes our **Ultra-Slim 3/4" Base Plate**, specifically designed for installation on narrow door frames or trim (requires a minimum surface width of 3/4 inch). CRITICAL: You MUST Select Your Specific Doorbell Model from the options list to receive the correct custom-fitted adapter bracket. Supports most major video doorbell brands (Ring, Nest, Eufy, Wyze, etc.). Uncertain About Your Doorbell? Brand names can be confusing! Please contact us with a photo before ordering if you're unsure. Need a Different Model? We frequently add support for new doorbells and offer custom designs. For assistance identifying Ring models, consult our Ring Model Guide. Extreme Angle Correction for Narrow Spaces! Dealing with an awkward mounting spot? This **15-90° Adjustable Swivel Mount** provides unprecedented aiming control, allowing you to turn your doorbell up to 90 degrees relative to the wall. Combined with its **ultra-slim 3/4-inch wide base**, it's the ultimate problem-solver for mounting on narrow door frames or posts while achieving a perpendicular side view. Correct challenging angles, overcome obstructions, and ensure your camera covers the critical approach path, even from the tightest installation locations. Explore Other Mounting Solutions Full Range Motion: 15-90° Pan & Tilt Freedom Achieve superior surveillance coverage with extensive adjustment capabilities. This mount's robust joint offers a **15-to-90-degree range of motion** both **horizontally and vertically**, allowing you to precisely direct your doorbell's camera lens. Flexible Base Orientation: The narrow 3/4" base can be oriented with screw holes vertically or horizontally, offering adaptability for different mounting surfaces while keeping the doorbell properly upright. Physical Specifications (Narrow Base Model) Mounting Base Width: 3/4 inches (0.75") - Installs on surfaces >= 3/4" wide. Mounting Base Length: Approx. 2.5 inches. Mounting Hole Spacing (Base): Typically 2 inches center-to-center (confirm if specific spacing needed). Swivel Range: Approx. 15° to 90° (Dual Axis). Protrusion: Varies with angle; includes neck for  at wider angles. Mounting Kit Highlights: Ultra-Slim 3/4" Base: Tailor-made for narrow door frames and minimal surface areas. Maximum Angle Flexibility (15-90°): Wide-range dual-axis swivel for extreme horizontal/vertical positioning. Corner & Side Wall Solution: Perfect for aiming camera around corners or from perpendicular walls. Customized Adapter Bracket: Select your doorbell model for a  secure fit. Solid Angle Locking: Set screws maintain the desired viewing angle reliably. Adaptable Base Install: Mount base plate vertically or horizontally as needed. Integrated Wire Channel: Allows for clean pass-through of doorbell wires. All-Weather Durability: Constructed from resilient, outdoor-grade PETG plastic. Ready-to-Install Kit: Includes narrow base, swivel unit, custom adapter, and all necessary screws. Modular Bracket System: Base may support different adapter brackets for future doorbell changes (check options). Setting Up Your Narrow Base Swivel Mount Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), doorbell & its specific hardware/tools. Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Mount NARROW Base: Route wires through the **Narrow (3/4" Wide) Base Piece**. Position on your >=3/4" trim/wall (screws vertical or horizontal). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors via the base's holes (typically 2" spacing). Ensure base is level & secure. Avoid overtightening base screws. Attach Swivel Bracket to Base: Route wires through the **Swivel Bracket**. Align onto Narrow Base & attach using four center screws provided (likely **#4 / PH1 driver**). Use correct PH1 bit. Start gently. Do NOT over-torque. Set Initial Angle (15-90°): Adjust swivel bracket (up/down & left/right). Lightly tighten one/two **set screws** (likely #4 / PH1 driver). Wire Doorbell: Connect wires per manufacturer's instructions (if applicable). Tuck excess wire. Attach Doorbell to Custom Bracket: Align your selected doorbell model (or its plate if used) with the pre-drilled holes on the custom swivel mount adapter bracket. Secure doorbell/plate using screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (likely #4 / PH1 driver). DO NOT USE doorbell manufacturer's wall screws. Follow any final steps for your model (e.g., faceplate security screws). Use correct drivers & provided screws. Tighten snugly. Finalize & Secure Angle: Make final adjustments. Fully tighten all **set screws** (likely PH1 driver) gently but firmly. Do not overtighten set screws! Hand-tight is generally sufficient. Restore power (if applicable) and test. Always follow safety protocols & your doorbell's specific guidelines. Use appropriate wall anchors. Using correct Philips bits prevents damage. Overcome Installation Obstacles Conquer Awkward Angles & Narrow Trim Don't let challenging mounting locations compromise your security view. This mount's combination of an ultra-slim 3/4" base and an expansive 15-90° swivel range allows secure installation on narrow door frames while enabling extreme angle adjustments needed for side walls or corner views. Achieve Comprehensive Coverage Precisely aim your doorbell camera to monitor walkways, driveways, package drop zones, or any critical area. The dual-axis movement provides the control needed to eliminate blind spots and maximize the effectiveness of your video doorbell. Protect Your  Made from durable, weatherproof PETG plastic, this mount provides a stable, long-lasting platform designed to withstand outdoor elements, ensuring your video doorbell remains secure and functional for years to come. Visual Guide & Product Examples Example showing potential 90-degree angle use: General installation concept video: Watch Installation Guide (Video demonstrates general swivel mount assembly.) Need Assistance or Customization? Confirming doorbell model compatibility is crucial! If unsure, or if your model isn't listed, please send photos before ordering. We also offer custom designs! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Include photos!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text photos!) Color Info: Ships in Black by default. To request White or another color, please add the Color Change Request listing to your order. Angle Range: Allows adjustment from approx. 15° up to 90° relative to the wall. 3D Printed Item: Made with durable PETG. Minor visual imperfections are normal for 3D printing and don't affect strength. Please contact us with quality concerns. Kit Includes: Narrow base, 15-90° swivel assembly, model-specific top adapter bracket, installation hardware. The perfect solution for narrow trim AND side walls! Order your Narrow Base 15-90° Swivel Mount now - don't forget to select your doorbell model!

} /* Offset Explained Box Style */ .offset-explained { background-color: #f8f9fa; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .offset-explained h2 { margin-top: 0; } .offset-explained .base-specs { font-size: 0.95em; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc;} /* Style for base specs */ .positioning-note { font-style: italic; color: #555; margin-top: 5px;} /* Style for positioning note */ /* Standard Section Styles */ .features ul { list-style: disc; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; text-align: center; } .media-section h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px 0; } .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; } /* Contact Info Box Style */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px;} .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Offset Brick Extension Mount for Roku Wireless Doorbell | Over Brick Position Compatibility: Roku Smart Home Wireless Doorbell ONLY Fits ONLY: The Roku Smart Home Wireless Doorbell. Intended Use: Mounting on trim/surface recessed behind brickwork to bring the doorbell forward AND shift it horizontally over the brick face. WILL NOT FIT: Other Roku devices, or doorbells from other brands (Ring, arlo, etc.). But will fit the Wyze Doorbell Pro Wireless Doorbell as these are the same rebranded models. Please ensure you have the correct Roku doorbell model before ordering. Position Your Roku Doorbell Over Brick & Offset It Sideways! Is your Roku Wireless Doorbell sunk deep behind brickwork? Is it too close to your door frame or swing path? This Offset Brick Extension Mount solves both problems! It extends your Roku doorbell forward so the mounting bracket clears the brick face AND shifts the doorbell horizontally over the brick, away from the door trim/opening. Ideal for getting the perfect position without drilling into brick! How it Works: Offset Extension for "Over Brick" Placement Unlike our centered extensions that aim for a different final position, this mount features a built-in HORIZONTAL OFFSET. This moves the doorbell sideways relative to the mounting base on your trim, designed to position the doorbell out over the face of the brick, away from the recessed trim area. This is ideal if your doorbell needs to be moved further away from the door swing path or centered visually over wider brick sections. If you need the doorbell to sit flush with the brick face (and only need to bring it straight forward), please see our "Centered Brick Face Extension Mount" listing. Note: This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face, not flush with it. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The mounting base is 9/16 inches wide, fitting most narrow trim areas. Standard mounting hole spacing on the base is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure adequate flat mounting surface on trim for mounting. Angled Trim? If your mounting trim surface is angled and not perpendicular to the wall, add our Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15° Options) to your order for a perfect vertical installation. CRITICAL: Measure for Your OFFSET Extension Length! Choosing the correct extension length ensures the mount clears your brickwork, allowing the offset bracket to properly position your doorbell over the brick face. Please measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (usually your recessed trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for this Offset mount type). This length ensures the extension arm reaches the brick face, allowing the offset bracket to correctly position your doorbell. Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. We offer various lengths (e.g., starting from 1/4 inch) to suit your needs. Need help measuring? Text or email us a picture of your setup! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: "Over Brick" Placement & Offset: Extends Roku doorbell forward past brick AND shifts it horizontally over the brick face. Designed for Roku Wireless: Ensures compatibility with the Roku Smart Home Wireless Doorbell. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim behind brickwork (Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Custom Extension Lengths: Order the precise depth needed based on your trim-to-brick-face measurement (min 1/4 inch). Narrow Base (9/16"): Fits most standard trim widths. Angle Shim Compatible: Works with our add-on shims for angled trim (sold separately). Clean Installation: Internal channel allows routing wires if needed. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic for outdoor use. Perfect Addition for Your Brick Home The Roku Wireless Doorbell Offset Brick Extension is the ideal accessory for optimizing your doorbell setup on brick homes. This extension securely positions your doorbell forward and offset for better visibility, accessibility, and aesthetics. Easy Installation and Compatibility Installation is simple – mount the base to your trim (using 2.5" hole spacing), select the correct extension length based on your measurement, and attach your Roku doorbell. No professional installation needed! Use angle shims if your trim is angled. Durable Design for All Weather Conditions Built with durable PETG to withstand outdoor elements, this extension ensures reliable performance and protects your Roku doorbell year-round. Questions About Compatibility, Measuring, or Installation? Need help measuring the extension length? Wondering about angled trim or confirming this offset mount is right for you? Send us a picture of your doorbell and mounting area! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 Standard Color: Black. Need a different color? Please purchase the separate "Color Change Request" listing along with this mount. About 3D Printed Quality: This mount is produced using 3D printing (PETG), resulting in a strong, functional part ideal for outdoor use. Minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be visible but do not affect durability or function. Your satisfaction is  – please reach out with any quality concerns! Order your Offset Brick Extension Mount for the Roku Wireless Doorbell today! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length. Add Angle Shims if your trim is angled!

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } Adjustable 0-35° Swivel Doorbell Mount with Narrow Base Compatibility: Select Your Doorbell Model! This mount fits most video doorbell brands (Ring, Nest, Eufy, Wyze, etc.). CRITICAL: You MUST select your specific Doorbell Model from the dropdown menu to receive the correct adapter plate and hardware. Intended Use: Ideal for fine-tuning your camera view on narrow surfaces like door trim or on siding. Perfect for Narrow Trim & Fine-Tuning Angles! Need to slightly adjust your video doorbell's viewing angle on a narrow surface? This Adjustable 0-35 Degree Swivel Mount is the perfect solution. It includes a specially designed 3/4-inch wide narrow base, making it ideal for slim trim, tight installation spots, and siding. Mount Specifications Adjustable Angle: 0 to 35 degrees (Horizontal or Vertical). Narrow Base Width: 3/4 inch (0.75") - Fits slim trim perfectly. Standard Depth: Extends approx. 3/8" from the wall. Optional Extension Depth: Can be extended up to 2 inches with an add-on. Customizable Hole Spacing: Standard hole spacing can be customized with an add-on. Features & Benefits: Precise Angle Adjustment: Easily tilt your doorbell left or right to get the exact view you need. Narrow Base Included: Perfect for installations on narrow mounting surfaces. Vertical & Horizontal Tuning: Adjust up, down, left, or right for comprehensive coverage. Works great on lapped siding. Optional Extensions & Hole Spacing: Need more  or have non-standard screw holes? Add-ons are available. Secure Lock: A side set screw locks your chosen angle firmly in place so it doesn’t move. Clean Wire Management: The swivel joint has a pass-through hole for a professional installation. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant material for outdoor use. Installation Steps Prep: Turn OFF power to your doorbell wiring at the breaker! Carefully remove any old doorbell button. Mount Narrow Base: Position the 3/4" narrow base on your trim. Secure it to the wall using appropriate screws. (If using an extension, install it now). Attach Swivel & Bracket: Attach the swivel mechanism and the adapter bracket for your specific doorbell model. Route wires through the center hole. Adjust Angle & Secure: Swivel the mount to your desired angle (0-35°). Tighten the side set screw to lock the position. Attach Doorbell: Connect the wires to your video doorbell. Secure the doorbell to the adapter bracket using the screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT. Power On: Restore power at the breaker and test your doorbell. Optional Add-ons & Customizations: Longer Narrow Extension Add-on Need more than the standard 3/8" depth to clear siding or trim? Add this extension piece to increase the depth up to 2 inches. Customize Hole Spacing Add-on Do your existing wall holes have non-standard spacing? Add this item to request custom hole spacing on the base. Installation Video Example Questions? Need Help Choosing Your Model? Unsure if this is the right mount? Send us a picture of your doorbell and mounting area! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com Text: 833-326-6868 Doorbell Not Included. This listing is for the adjustable narrow base mount only. Default Color: The default color is Black. For other colors, please find the 'color change request' listing or contact us. 3D Printed Quality: While our 3D printing process yields high-quality, functional parts, minor cosmetic imperfections may be present. These do not affect the mount's function. If you have any quality concerns, please contact us.

- [Ring Video Doorbell 3 3+ Brick Doorbell Extension Mount -Standard 5/8" Offset Over Brick Away from Door](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/ring-video-doorbell-3-3-brick-doorbell-extension-mount-standard-5-8-offset-over-brick-away-from-door): This mount is a fixed Brick doorbell extension mount to Fit Ring Video Doorbell 3 (also fit all Ring models with Removable Batteries including Ring 2/3/3+/4). Extend the doorbell Over Brick Away from Door, to get this wide doorbell to fit where you have a storm door or other narrow trim right next to the brick. This Mount fits this Doorbell found on Amazon ( link below) In cases where the doorbell is located behind a thick brick wall or other obstruction, the extension can be used to move the button or doorbell to a location where it is visible and opposite the door. It is available in various extension lengths. If you cant mount your doorbell flat, or if something is in the way of the view, you can use this mount to correct it. These mounts allow for wires to pass through the center. The Standard Offset of 5/8" leaves about 5/8in gap on door side. (5/8" Offset means the center of the doorbell is offset 5/8in over the brick side which is for most smaller doorbells, mostly offsets the doorbell over the brick, so it is a more universal base for the brick extensions we ) Full Offset is flush with door side. For example See picture Below. Click the picture to be taken to the full offset listing for the Ring Plus. This listing is not full offset. If you dont need the full offset and you want an extension that is about $10 cheaper the standard offset leaves about 5/8in on the door side. The listing can be found by clicking the picture below: If you have angled trim you can get angled shims to make sure your brick extension is perpendicular: If you have a gap where you hole for your doorbell wire is far from your brick, you have a few options. You can 1. Install a Bottom Filler Spacer Plate - Also Correct Angled Trim too in Combination. 2. Provide a bottom Mouse Hole in the Brick Extension 3. Add Body Shim Filler Plate NORMAL COLOR is Black, if you need to purchase a different color, there will be a color change request listing to change the color. Enhance Your Home Security with a Doorbell Extension Be sure to send me a picture of your doorbell and where you want to mount it. Message me by email at shop@doorbellmount.com or text me at 833-326-6868 All my mounts have holes to allow for wire passthrough. ****While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, there are often imperfections that may be found on the prints. These do not impair the function and rarely affect the aesthetics. But if your not happy with the quality, please text, email, or message me before leaving a review. Optimal Placement with Doorbell Extension Installing a doorbell can be tricky, especially on brick surfaces. The Doorbell Extension allows you to position your Ring Video Doorbell 3 or 3+ securely away from the door. This 5/8" offset feature brings the doorbell into a more usable view, ensuring that visitors are easily visible. Moreover, it helps in avoiding any obstructions like door frames or decor items that can hinder the effective monitoring of your doorstep. Durable and Weather-Resistant Design When you choose the Doorbell Extension, you are opting for a product built to last. This mount is specifically designed to withstand various weather conditions, ensuring your doorbell remains functional and reliable. The solid construction of the Brick Mount not only supports your video doorbell but also integrates seamlessly with your home’s exterior. Because of this strength and durability, you can trust it to keep your doorbell and home safe. Easy Installation to Get Started Quickly The installation process is straightforward, allowing you to set up your Doorbell Extension in no time. With the provided instructions, you can mount it yourself, saving money on professional installation services. It comes with all necessary hardware, so you don't need to purchase anything extra. This ease of installation means you can start enhancing your home security without unnecessary delays, making it a smart choice for homeowners.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Standard Offset Brick Extension for Ring Removable Battery Doorbells (2/3/3+/4) Compatibility: Ring Doorbells with REMOVABLE Battery ONLY! Fits ONLY: Ring models where the battery pack can be fully removed for charging. This includes: Ring Video Doorbell 2 (NOT GEN2) Ring Video Doorbell 3 / 3 Plus Ring Video Doorbell 4 (Does NOT fit Battery Doorbell Plus or Pro models which have different bodies) Confirm your model looks like this (requires removing bottom cover to access screws): (Example Images - Click first for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Ring models with Integrated Batteries (Gen 1, Gen 2 2020), or ANY Pro/Plus/Wired models. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure? Send us a photo! Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Extend Your Ring Battery Doorbell Past Brick with Standard Offset! Is your Ring Doorbell (2, 3, 3 Plus, or 4) mounted on trim set back from brick or stone? Need more  for a storm door? This **Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount** brings your doorbell forward for better visibility and provides a moderate sideways shift. Installs easily onto your existing trim (minimum 9/16" wide) without drilling into brick, positioning your removable-battery Ring doorbell correctly relative to the brick face. How it Works: Standard Offset (5/8") This mount uses our popular STANDARD OFFSET. The center of your Ring Doorbell will be shifted approximately 5/8 inches horizontally towards the brick side relative to the center of the narrow 9/16" base. This leaves about 3/8 inch of the base visible near the door frame. This configuration provides good  and viewing angles for many installations, positioning the doorbell partially over the adjacent brick. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Standard Offset (This Product) vs Full Offset: Need Maximum Sideways ? Click here for the Full Offset version for these models. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Fits Ring Removable Battery Models: Compatible with Ring Video Doorbell 2, 3, 3 Plus, and 4. Standard 5/8" Offset: Provides good sideways positioning for most common needs, including storm door . "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick, positioning it partially over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Fits most standard trim widths. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates optional hardwiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket is replaceable for future upgrades (available here). How to Install Your Standard Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver (often orange, from doorbell box). Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure battery is charged but removed during install. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires. Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Hardwiring): Connect wires to your Ring Doorbell following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire. Attach Ring Doorbell: Take the main body of your Ring Doorbell (with battery removed, faceplate off). Align the mounting holes on the back of the doorbell body with the holes on the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the **doorbell body** to the Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1 driver). Do NOT use Ring's longer wall screws here. Re-install the battery (if not hardwired) and snap the Ring faceplate back on. Secure with Ring's security screw(s) at the bottom using the Ring screwdriver. Use correct drivers/tools for each screw type. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Home Security Experience Why Choose the Brick Extension? This extension is designed specifically for Ring battery doorbells (2/3/3+/4) allowing optimal placement when mounting near brick. The standard 5/8" offset improves visibility and functionality, overcoming challenges posed by recessed trim or new storm doors, enhancing accessibility and security. Simple Installation with Reliable Materials Crafted from high-quality PETG, this brick extension ensures durability. Installation onto existing trim is straightforward, avoiding complex masonry drilling, making it suitable for DIY setup. Upgrade Your Home Security Extending and offsetting your doorbell improves aesthetics and enhances security by providing a clearer, wider view for your camera. Ensure your Ring doorbell effectively monitors your entryway. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have a compatible Ring Removable Battery model (2, 3, 3+, 4). Need help measuring extension length? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures! Corrected Number) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Standard Offset Brick Extension for your Ring Doorbell (2, 3, 3+, 4) today! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Full Offset Brick Extension for Ring Removable Battery Doorbells (2/3/3+/4) Compatibility: Ring Doorbells with REMOVABLE Battery ONLY! Fits ONLY: Ring models where the battery pack can be fully removed via a bottom/side cover. This includes: Ring Video Doorbell 2 Ring Video Doorbell 3 / 3 Plus Ring Video Doorbell 4 (Does NOT fit Battery Doorbell Plus or Pro models, Integrated Battery Gen 1/2, or any Pro/Wired models) Confirm your model uses a removable battery and the mounting pattern shown below: (Example Images - Click first for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure? Send us a photo! Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Maximum Door  for Your Ring Battery Doorbell! Is your Ring Doorbell (2, 3, 3+, or 4) mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Is your door or storm door swing extremely close? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the maximum sideways ! It extends your doorbell forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell body entirely sideways over the brick face, creating the most space possible next to your door frame. Installs on trim >= 9/16" wide without drilling brick. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Ring Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge is flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over the adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. Ideal when door swing  is the absolute priority. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for these models. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Fits Ring Removable Battery Models: Compatible with Ring Video Doorbell 2, 3, 3 Plus, and 4. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick, positioning it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates optional hardwiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket is replaceable for future doorbell upgrades (available here). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base (with Full Offset) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver (often orange, from doorbell box). Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure battery is charged but removed during install. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max ). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Hardwiring): Connect wires to your Ring Doorbell following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire. Attach Ring Doorbell: Take the main body of your Ring Doorbell (with battery removed, faceplate off). Align the mounting holes on the back of the doorbell body with the holes on the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the **doorbell body** to the Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1 driver). Do NOT use Ring's longer wall screws here. Re-install the battery (if not hardwired) and snap the Ring faceplate back on. Secure with Ring's security screw(s) at the bottom using the Ring screwdriver. Use correct drivers/tools for each screw type. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have a compatible Ring Removable Battery model (2, 3, 3+, 4). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures! ) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Doorbell (2, 3, 3+, 4)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .installation-steps h2 { color: #155724; margin-top: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #c3e6cb; padding-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps ol { padding-left: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #000; padding: 10px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: block; } .warning-box strong { color: #721c24; } /* Add-ons Section Style - LIGHT PURPLE */ .add-ons { background-color: #f2e7fe; color: #563d7c; font-weight: bold;} .add-ons a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; text-align: center; } .media-section h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #eee;} .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Contact Info Box Style (Light Grey) */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Formerly Pro 1) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The model currently called Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (which was previously known as the original Ring Pro or "Pro 1"). This model has a **Flat Back with Ridges**. Confirm your model matches the pictures below: (Example Images - Click middle for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The newer Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) or ANY other Ring model (Battery versions, Wired 2021, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Ring's naming causes confusion! Please double-check or send us a photo. Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Maximum Door  for Your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro 1)! Installing your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly Pro) on trim set back from brick? Need maximum  for a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is the solution! It extends your doorbell forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell body entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space. Installs easily on trim >= 9/16" wide without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Ring Wired Doorbell Plus attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the perfect solution when door swing  is the top priority. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro 1). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure Like this for Extension Distance. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Tailored Fit: Specifically for Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly Pro / Pro 1). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base (with Full Offset) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver (from doorbell box, typically star-shaped). Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max ). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Wired Doorbell Plus). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell: Connect wires to your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire into base cavity. Attach Ring Doorbell Plus (Pro): Remove the faceplate from your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus. Align the doorbell body with the mounting features on the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the doorbell body to the Adapter Bracket using the small side security screws that came WITH YOUR RING DOORBELL and the corresponding Ring screwdriver. Snap the faceplate back onto the doorbell. Use Ring's side security screws & tool. Do NOT use our mount screws for this step. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ring model names are tricky! Ensure you have the Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly Pro 1). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro 1)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The model currently called Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (also widely known as the Pro 2). This model has a slightly curved back. Confirm your model matches the images below: (Example Images - Click first two for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly called Ring Pro / Pro 1 - has flat back w/ ridges) or ANY other Ring model (Battery versions, Wired 2021, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Ring's naming causes confusion! Please double-check or send us a photo. Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Max  & Forward Extension for Your Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2)! Installing your Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) on trim set back from brick? Is your door swing incredibly close, needing every bit of ? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is engineered for exactly these tight spots! It extends your Pro 2 forward past the brick (select the length needed) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell body entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space between it and your door frame. Avoid drilling into brick and solve door  issues! Full Offset Explained (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) attaches so its door-facing edge is flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over the adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. Ideal when door swing  is the top priority. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need less offset? Click for the Standard Offset version (requires >=9/16" trim). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) to ensure a perpendicular mount. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Tailored Fit: Specifically for Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) with its curved back. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver/bit (from doorbell box). Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Drill pilot holes. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Pro 2). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell: Connect wires to your Ring Wired Doorbell Pro following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire into base cavity. Attach Ring Doorbell Pro (Pro 2): Align the main **BODY** of your Ring Wired Doorbell Pro onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the **doorbell body** to the Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1 driver). Do NOT use Ring's wall screws here. Once the body is secure, attach the Ring Wired Doorbell Pro **FACEPLATE** using the security screw(s) and tool PROVIDED BY RING. Use correct drivers/tools for each screw type. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ring model names are challenging! Ensure you have the Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2). Need help measuring extension length? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures! Corrected Number) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Doorbell Gen 2 (2020) Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount (5/8" Offset) Compatibility Check: Ring Battery Doorbell (Gen 2 - 2020, Integrated Battery) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The Ring Battery Video Doorbell (2nd Generation) released in 2020 and 2025. This model has an **integrated (non-removable) battery** and charges via the orange button on the back. Also fits original Gen 1 model with integrated battery. Please confirm your model matches the pictures below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Ring models with REMOVABLE batteries (Ring 2, 3, 4, Battery Plus/Pro), or ANY Pro/Pro 2/Wired models. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide. Confused by Ring models? Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Extend Your Ring Gen 2 Past Brick with Standard Offset! Is your Ring Doorbell (Gen 2, 2020 Integrated Battery model) installed on trim that's set back from your brick or stone siding? This **Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount** is designed to bring your doorbell forward for better visibility and access, while providing a moderate sideways offset. Mounts easily to your existing trim (minimum 9/16" wide), avoiding drilling into masonry. How it Works: Standard Offset (5/8") This mount features our widely compatible STANDARD OFFSET, which shifts the center of the doorbell approximately 5/8 inches horizontally towards the brick side relative to the center of the mount's base. On our standard 9/16" wide base, this typically leaves about 7/16 inches of the base visible on the side closest to the door frame. This "Standard Offset" works well for many installations, positioning the doorbell partially over the brick. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face, not flush with it. Standard Offset (This Product) vs Full Offset: Need Maximum Sideways ? Click for the Full Offset version (requires >=9/16" trim). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The standard mounting base for offset extensions is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure adequate flat mounting surface on trim. Use appropriate screws for trim material (not included for wall attachment). Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15° Options) to correct the angle (sold separately). CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choosing the correct extension length ensures the mount clears your brickwork. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Min. 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture of your setup! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Perfect Fit: For Ring Video Doorbell Gen 2 (2020, Integrated Battery) & Gen 1. Standard 5/8" Offset: Shifts doorbell sideways for good  and view in many situations. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick, positioning it partially over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick Face measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Fits most standard trim widths. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel for optional hardwiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, angle adapters, fillers etc. Future-Proof Base: Compatible with replacement brackets for future doorbell upgrades (available here). How to Install Your Standard Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed for wall). Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure doorbell is charged if using battery. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (piece with selected length/offset) on your trim over wires (ensure offset is correct side). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors if needed into the 2.5" spaced holes. Drill pilot holes. Don't overtighten base screws. Ensure base is level. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Gen 2). Align this bracket onto the front of the mounted Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (Size #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until bracket is flush and secure. Check for/clear any plastic debris in pilot holes if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Applicable): Connect wires to your Ring Doorbell Gen 2 following Ring's instructions (if hardwiring). Tuck excess wire. Attach Ring Doorbell: First, securely screw the plastic mounting bracket that came WITH YOUR RING DOORBELL onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (likely #4 / PH1). Then, clip/attach your Ring Doorbell (Gen 2) onto **its own bracket**. Secure with Ring's security screws (using Ring's tool) at the bottom. Do NOT use Ring's long wall screws here. Use correct driver sizes for our screws and Ring's security screws. BUT DO use Rings Screws for Security Screws. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for your wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim to ensure your extension points straight out. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the base for side-exiting wires. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ring models are confusing! Ensure you have the Gen 2 (2020, Integrated Battery). Need help measuring or choosing options? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order your Standard Offset Brick Extension for the Ring Doorbell Gen 2 today! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Formerly Pro 1) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The model currently called Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (which was previously known as the original Ring Pro or "Pro 1"). This model has a **Flat Back with Ridges**. Confirm your model matches the pictures below: (Example Images - Click middle for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The newer Ring Wired Doorbell Pro (Pro 2) or ANY other Ring model (Battery versions, Wired 2021, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Ring's naming causes confusion! Please double-check or send us a photo. Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Maximum Door  for Your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro 1)! Installing your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly Pro) on trim set back from brick? Need maximum  for a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is the solution! It extends your doorbell forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell body entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space. Installs easily on trim >= 9/16" wide without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Ring Wired Doorbell Plus attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the perfect solution when door swing  is the top priority. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro 1). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Tailored Fit: Specifically for Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly Pro / Pro 1). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base (with Full Offset) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver (from doorbell box, typically star-shaped). Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max ). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Wired Doorbell Plus). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell: Connect wires to your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire into base cavity. Attach Ring Doorbell Plus (Pro): Remove the faceplate from your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus. Align the doorbell body with the mounting features on the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the doorbell body to the Adapter Bracket using the small side security screws that came WITH YOUR RING DOORBELL and the corresponding Ring screwdriver. Snap the faceplate back onto the doorbell. Use Ring's side security screws & tool. Do NOT use our mount screws for this step. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ring model names are tricky! Ensure you have the Wired Doorbell Plus (formerly Pro 1). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Wired Doorbell Plus (Pro 1)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.
