Fits ONLY: The original wired **Google Nest Doorbell (1st Gen)**, also known as the **Nest Hello**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The newer Google Nest Doorbell (Battery) or the Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure which Nest model you have? Please send us a picture before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your Nest Hello! Installing your Nest Hello (Wired 1st Gen) on trim set back from brick or stone? Is your door or storm door swing extremely close, leaving no room? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the maximum possible sideways ! It extends your Nest Hello forward past the brick (select the exact length needed) and utilizes our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, creating essential space next to your door frame. Installs on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into your masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount features our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Nest Hello attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset options. Ideal when every bit of  from a door swing or storm door is critical. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Nest Hello. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design provides ultimate door swing . Designed for Nest Hello: Perfect fit for Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 1st Gen). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates Nest Hello wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Nest Hello This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Nest Hello wall plate & release tool. Turn OFF power to doorbell wiring at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Nest Hello). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Nest Wall Plate: Secure the **metal wall plate that came WITH your Nest Hello** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure it's oriented correctly. Do NOT use Nest's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Nest Hello: Connect wires to the Nest Hello wall plate following Google Nest instructions. Carefully clip the Nest Hello doorbell onto its wall plate until it clicks securely. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. (Use Nest release tool if removal is needed). Follow safety rules & Google Nest guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Nest Hello (Wired, 1st Gen). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Nest Hello / Nest Wired (1st Gen)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro Offset Brick Extension Mount Compatibility: Ubiquiti UniFi G4 Doorbell Pro ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Ubiquiti UniFi G4 Doorbell Pro**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The standard Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell (non-Pro) or any other brand. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please double-check your Ubiquiti model before ordering! Extend Your Ubiquiti G4 Pro Past Brick with Standard Offset! Is your UniFi G4 Doorbell Pro mounted on trim that's recessed behind brick or stone? This **Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount** is designed to bring your doorbell forward for better visibility and access, while providing a moderate sideways offset often needed for door or storm door . Installs easily onto your existing trim (minimum 9/16" wide) without drilling into brick, positioning your G4 Pro correctly relative to the brick face. How it Works: Standard Offset (5/8") This mount features our popular STANDARD OFFSET, which shifts the center of the G4 Pro doorbell approximately 5/8 inches horizontally towards the brick side relative to the center of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This typically leaves about **3/8 inch** of the base visible near the door frame. This configuration is reversible (for left or right offset) and positions the doorbell partially over the adjacent brick, providing good  for many situations. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Standard Offset (This Product) vs Full Offset: Need Maximum Sideways ? Click here for the Full Offset version for the G4 Pro. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Designed for Ubiquiti G4 Pro: Ensures perfect compatibility with the UniFi G4 Doorbell Pro. Standard 5/8" Offset: Provides good sideways positioning and door . (Reversible Left/Right). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick, positioning it partially over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Fits most standard trim widths. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates G4 Pro wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Standard Offset Extension for G4 Pro This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ubiquiti G4 Pro mounting bracket & screws. Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure offset is desired direction L/R). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for G4 Pro). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Ubiquiti Wall Bracket: Secure the **wall mounting bracket that came WITH your G4 Pro** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Do NOT use Ubiquiti's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount G4 Pro: Connect wires to the Ubiquiti wall bracket per UniFi instructions. Mount the G4 Doorbell Pro unit onto its bracket. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Ubiquiti guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro. Need help measuring extension length or choosing Standard vs Full Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Standard Offset Brick Extension for your Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro today! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Logitech Circle View Doorbell Full Offset Brick Extension | Max  Compatibility: Logitech Circle View Doorbell ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Logitech Circle View Doorbell**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Any other Logitech products or doorbells from other brands (Ring, Nest, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please double-check your doorbell model before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your Logitech Circle View Doorbell! Is your Logitech Circle View Doorbell mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum space to avoid interference from your door or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is engineered for these tight installations! It extends your Logitech doorbell forward past the brick (select the required length) and uses our unique **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing . Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into your masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Logitech Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This provides the most  possible for tight door swing situations. The offset is reversible for left or right side mounting. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Logitech Circle View Doorbell. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design provides ultimate door swing . Tailored Fit: Specifically designed for Logitech Circle View Doorbell. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates Logitech wiring. Reversible Offset: Base can be flipped for left or right offset. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Logitech Circle View This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Logitech Doorbell's wall plate/wedge & hardware. Turn OFF power to doorbell wiring at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Logitech). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Logitech Wall Plate: Secure the **wall plate or wedge that came WITH your Logitech Circle View Doorbell** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure it's oriented correctly. Do NOT use Logitech's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Logitech Doorbell: Connect wires to the Logitech wall plate/wedge following Logitech's instructions. Carefully align and click the Logitech Circle View Doorbell onto its plate until secure. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Logitech guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Perfect Fit and Placement for Your Logitech Doorbell Optimized for Brick Surfaces & Tight Spaces The Full Offset Brick Extension is specifically designed for accommodating the Logitech Circle View doorbell near brick. The 9/16-inch wide base allows installation on narrow trim, while the full offset ensures maximum  and positions your doorbell perfectly over the brick face for optimal visibility and precision capture. Built to Last and Easy to Install Made from durable, weather-resistant PETG, this mount withstands outdoor conditions, ensuring longevity. Installation onto existing trim is straightforward with included hardware and clear instructions, saving you time and avoiding complex masonry work. Enhanced Aesthetics and Security Achieve a clean, professional look by extending your doorbell past recessed trim. The offset design complements the Logitech Circle View's modern aesthetic while ensuring optimal camera placement for enhanced home security monitoring. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Logitech Circle View Doorbell. Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Logitech Circle View Doorbell! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #000; padding: 10px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: block; } .warning-box strong { color: #721c24; } /* Standard Sections (Default Background) */ .product-info { margin-bottom: 20px; } .features ul { list-style: disc; } .benefits-section { margin-top: 20px; } .benefits-section h3 { color: #0056b3; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 5px; } .benefits-section p { margin-bottom: 1em; } /* Add-ons Section Style - LIGHT PURPLE */ .add-ons { background-color: #f2e7fe; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #d6bbf1; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .add-ons h2 { color: #563d7c; margin-top: 0; } .add-ons ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; } .add-ons li { border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; } .add-ons li:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; } .add-ons img { max-height: 100px; /* Adjusted max-height */ width: auto; max-width: 250px; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid #eee; vertical-align: middle; } .add-ons .addon-info { flex-grow: 1; } .add-ons .addon-info p { margin-top: 3px; font-size: 0.9em; } .add-ons a { text-decoration: none; color: #563d7c; font-weight: bold;} .add-ons a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 5px; background-color: #fafafa;} .media-section h2 { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; padding-bottom: 0.5em;} .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #ccc;} .media-section iframe { max-width: 100%; margin: 10px auto; display: block; aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; height: auto; border: 0; } .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Contact Info Box Style (Light Grey) */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Narrow Fixed Doorbell Mount Base (3/4" Wide) | Select Your Model Compatibility: Select Your Doorbell Model! This fixed mounting base system fits many popular video doorbells (Ring, Nest, Eufy, Wyze, Blink, etc.). CRITICAL: You MUST select your specific Doorbell Model from the options list on this page. We will send the correct top adapter bracket (pre-drilled for your model) which attaches to this base. Intended Use: Replaces standard doorbell buttons on narrow trim (3/4" wide) or fixes mounting issues on slightly raised surfaces. Provides a stable, non-angled platform. Model Not Listed? We specialize in custom solutions! Contact us with your doorbell details. (Contact info below). Need help identifying a Ring model? Check our Ring Model Guide. Perfect Mount for Narrow Trim & Replacing Old Doorbells! Struggling to mount your new video doorbell on narrow 3/4-inch wide trim? Or is your trim slightly raised, causing your doorbell to sit unevenly? This Narrow Fixed Doorbell Mount is the perfect solution! It's designed as a direct replacement for old doorbell buttons, using standard screw hole spacing. This mount provides a stable, low-profile (only 3/8" deep standard), non-angled platform. Its clean design hides the base mounting screws behind the doorbell bracket for a professional finish. Mount Specifications Base Width: 3/4 inches (0.75") - Fits narrow trim perfectly. Base Length: Approx. 2.5 inches Standard Base Hole Spacing: 2 inches (center-to-center) - Matches many old doorbells. (Custom spacing available as add-on). Standard Depth: Approx. 3/8 inches extension from the wall (low profile). (Longer extensions available as add-on). Features & Benefits: Narrow 3/4" Base: Ideal size for most standard door trim. Fixed Non-Angled Design: Provides a stable, straight mounting platform. Low Profile: Standard depth is only 3/8" off the mounting surface. Direct Replacement: Often uses existing 2-inch screw holes from old doorbells. Hidden Base Screws: Base mounting screws are concealed behind the top bracket for a clean look. Requires Model Selection: Get the correct pre-drilled top bracket for your specific doorbell. Wire Passthrough: Allows wiring to run cleanly through the mount. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant material for outdoor use (superior to PLA). Customizable & Expandable: Options available for angle, extension length, and hole spacing (see Add-ons). Future-Proof System: Easily upgrade your doorbell later by purchasing just a new adapter bracket (here, approx. $10) to fit this base. Installing Your Fixed Narrow Mount Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level (optional), Anchors (if needed). Turn OFF power to doorbell wiring at the breaker! Remove Old Doorbell & Mount Base: Remove your old doorbell button. Position the narrow base piece over the existing wires and screw holes (standard 2" spacing). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size recommended - check fit, screws may not be included for base-to-wall) and anchors if needed. Use a PH2 driver if using #6 screws. Ensure base is level. Drill pilot holes if needed. Do not overtighten screws. Attach Top Bracket: Route wires through the top bracket (specific to your selected doorbell). Place the top bracket over the mounted base, ensuring it covers the base screws. Secure the top bracket to the base using the small **set screws** provided (usually from behind/side, likely requires PH1 driver). Tighten set screws snugly to secure the bracket. Wire Doorbell: Connect wires to your new video doorbell per manufacturer's instructions. Tuck excess wire into base cavity. Attach Doorbell to Top Bracket: Align your selected doorbell model with the pre-drilled holes on the top bracket. Secure the doorbell using the screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1 driver). DO NOT USE screws that came with your doorbell. Replace doorbell cover if applicable. Use correct PH1 driver. Tighten gently, avoid overtightening. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is securely mounted. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & doorbell guidelines. Use anchors if needed. Correct Philips bit size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Customizations: Need to adjust the angle, depth, or hole spacing? We have solutions! Angle Adapter Add-on Need to angle your doorbell horizontally? Add this piece between the base and top bracket. Extension Add-on Need more than the standard 3/8" depth? Add this extension piece between the base and top bracket. Customize Hole Spacing Add-on Do your existing wall holes have spacing different than the standard 2 inches? Add this item to request custom hole spacing on the base. Custom Color Want your mount in White, Brown, Grey, or another color (instead of standard Black)? Add this item to your order. Installation Video Concept (Video may show similar products; general concept applies.) Questions? Need Help Choosing Your Model or Options? Unsure if this mount fits your doorbell or installation needs? Send us a picture of your doorbell and mounting area! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text pictures!) Default Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. This listing includes the 2-piece fixed mount (base + top bracket specific to your selected doorbell) and installation screws for assembly and doorbell attachment (base-to-wall screws may not be included). PETG Recommended: This mount is printed in PETG, rated for outdoor use. Be wary of similar items from other sellers using PLA, which is not suitable for outdoor conditions. 3D Printed Quality: While our 3D printing process yields high-quality, functional parts, minor cosmetic imperfections inherent to the process may be present. These do not affect the mount's strength or function. If you have any quality concerns, please contact us before leaving a review. Order your Narrow Fixed Doorbell Mount today for a clean, stable installation on narrow trim! Remember to select your doorbell model.

background-color: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffeeba; padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; border-radius: 5px; } .measurement-guide h2 { color: #856404; margin-top: 0;} .measurement-guide strong { color: #5b4502; } /* Offset Explained Box Style */ .offset-explained { background-color: #f8f9fa; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .offset-explained h2, .offset-explained h3 { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0.5em; } .offset-explained .base-specs { font-size: 0.95em; margin-top: 15px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc;} .positioning-note { font-style: italic; color: #555; margin-top: 5px;} .offset-comparison img { max-width: 324px; height: auto; display: block; margin: 10px auto; border: 1px solid #ddd;} .offset-comparison p { text-align: center; font-size: 0.9em; } /* Standard Section Styles */ .features ul { list-style: disc; } .benefits-section { margin-top: 20px; } .benefits-section h3 { color: #0056b3; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 5px; } .benefits-section p { margin-bottom: 1em; } /* Installation Steps Style - LIGHT GREEN */ .installation-steps { background-color: #e6ffed; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .installation-steps h2 { color: #155724; margin-top: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #c3e6cb; padding-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps ol { padding-left: 1.5em; margin-top: 1em;} .installation-steps li { margin-bottom: 1em; } .installation-steps ul { list-style-type: disc; margin-top: 0.5em; margin-left: 1em; padding-left: 1em;} .installation-steps ul li { margin-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps .step-note { margin-top: 0.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #000; padding: 10px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: block; } .warning-box strong { color: #721c24; } /* Add-ons Section Style - LIGHT PURPLE */ .add-ons { background-color: #f2e7fe; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #d6bbf1; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .add-ons h2 { color: #563d7c; margin-top: 0; } .add-ons ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; } .add-ons li { border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; } .add-ons li:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; } .add-ons img { max-height: 100px; width: auto; max-width: 250px; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid #eee; vertical-align: middle; } .add-ons .addon-info { flex-grow: 1; } .add-ons .addon-info p { margin-top: 3px; font-size: 0.9em; } .add-ons a { text-decoration: none; color: #563d7c; font-weight: bold;} .add-ons a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; text-align: center; } .media-section h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #eee;} .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Contact Info Box Style (Light Grey) */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Eufy Doorbell (Single Cam) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Eufy Single Camera Doorbells ONLY! Fits ONLY: Eufy Video Doorbells with a **single camera lens** (compatible with both Wired & Wireless versions sharing the same body style). Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Eufy **Dual Camera** doorbells or doorbells from other brands (Ring, Nest, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please verify your Eufy model before ordering! Send us a picture if unsure. Maximum Door  for Your Eufy Single Camera Doorbell! Is your Eufy Single Camera Doorbell mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum space to avoid your door or storm door hitting it? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the ultimate sideways ! It extends your Eufy doorbell forward past the brick (select the required length) and uses our unique **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face. Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Eufy Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. Ideal when door swing or storm door  is the top priority. The offset is reversible for left or right side mounting. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for Eufy Single Camera Doorbells. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design provides ultimate door swing . Designed for Eufy Single Camera Doorbells: Fits common Wired & Wireless models. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates optional wiring. Reversible Offset: Base can be flipped for left or right offset. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Eufy Doorbell This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Eufy doorbell backplate & hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure doorbell is charged if battery version. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Eufy). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Eufy Backplate: Secure the **backplate that came WITH your Eufy Doorbell** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure it's oriented correctly. Do NOT use Eufy's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Eufy Doorbell: Connect wires (if applicable) to the Eufy backplate following Eufy's instructions. Click the Eufy Doorbell unit firmly onto its backplate until secure. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Eufy guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optimize Your Doorbell Placement Perfect Fit for Your Eufy Doorbell This Full Offset Brick Extension is specifically designed for Eufy Single Camera doorbells, ensuring a secure fit and seamless integration. The full offset is ideal for positioning your doorbell for optimal visibility and performance, especially when dealing with obstructions or tight clearances. Easy Installation and Reliable Performance Installing this mount onto existing trim is straightforward, avoiding complex masonry work. Securely attach the base, select your length, mount the Eufy backplate, and click on your doorbell for a hassle-free setup. Durable Construction for Lasting Use Built from high-quality, weather-resistant PETG, this extension provides outstanding durability. It ensures your Eufy doorbell remains securely mounted and fully operational year-round, contributing to your home's security. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have a compatible Eufy Single Camera Doorbell (Wired or Wireless). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Eufy Single Camera Doorbell! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Offset Brick Extension Mount Compatibility: Ubiquiti UniFi G4 Doorbell Pro ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Ubiquiti UniFi G4 Doorbell**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The standard Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell (Pro) or any other brand. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please double-check your Ubiquiti model before ordering! Extend Your Ubiquiti G4 Past Brick with Standard Offset! Is your UniFi G4 Doorbell mounted on trim that's recessed behind brick or stone? This **Standard Offset Brick Extension Mount** is designed to bring your doorbell forward for better visibility and access, while providing a moderate sideways offset often needed for door or storm door . Installs easily onto your existing trim (minimum 9/16" wide) without drilling into brick, positioning your G4 Pro correctly relative to the brick face. How it Works: Standard Offset (5/8") This mount features our popular STANDARD OFFSET, which shifts the center of the G4 Pro doorbell approximately 5/8 inches horizontally towards the brick side relative to the center of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This typically leaves about **3/8 inch** of the base visible near the door frame. This configuration is reversible (for left or right offset) and positions the doorbell partially over the adjacent brick, providing good  for many situations. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Standard Offset (This Product) vs Full Offset: Need Maximum Sideways ? Click here for the Full Offset version for the G4 Pro. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Designed for Ubiquiti G4: Ensures perfect compatibility with the UniFi G4 Doorbell. Standard 5/8" Offset: Provides good sideways positioning and door . (Reversible Left/Right). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick, positioning it partially over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for standard trim widths. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates G4 Pro wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Standard Offset Extension for G4 This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ubiquiti G4 mounting bracket & hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker AND disconnect Ethernet cable if using PoE! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure offset is desired direction L/R). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for G4 Pro). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Ubiquiti Wall Bracket: Secure the **wall mounting bracket that came WITH your G4 Pro** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure correct orientation. Do NOT use Ubiquiti's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount G4: Connect wires (Power and/or Ethernet) to the Ubiquiti wall bracket following UniFi instructions. Mount the G4 Doorbell unit onto its bracket. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Ubiquiti guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Doorbell Installation with Offset Extender Perfect Fit for Any Brick Surface The Standard Offset Extender is designed specifically for the Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro, allowing for seamless installation near brick surfaces. Its 9/16 inch wide base and standard 5/8 inch offset make it ideal for various mounting requirements, ensuring your doorbell aligns well and functions effectively. Durable and Reliable Design Constructed from high-quality PETG, the Offset Extender is built to withstand outdoor conditions. Its robust design ensures that it stays securely fixed, guaranteeing a snug fit that doesn’t compromise the aesthetics of your home while protecting your G4 Pro. Easy Installation for Every Homeowner Installing the Offset Extender onto existing trim is straightforward. Mount the base, attach the adapter, select your extension length, and mount your doorbell using the included hardware and instructions for a hassle-free setup. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell Pro. Need help measuring extension length or choosing Standard vs Full Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Standard Offset Brick Extension for your Ubiquiti G4 Doorbell today! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Battery Doorbell Plus Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Ring Battery Doorbell Plus & Similar REMOVABLE Battery Models! Primary Fit: Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (Newest removable battery model). Also Fits: Other Ring models using the same body style with a REMOVABLE battery (Ring 2, Ring 3, Ring 3 Plus, Ring 4). Confirm your model uses a removable battery & this mounting pattern: WILL NOT FIT: Ring Wired Doorbell **Pro** (uses different body), models with Integrated Batteries (Gen 1, Gen 2 2020), or ANY Pro/Wired models. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure? Send us a photo! Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Maximum Door  for Your Ring Battery Doorbell Plus! Installing your Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (or similar removable battery model like Ring 2/3/4) on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum  for a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is the perfect solution! It extends your doorbell forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell body entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space next to your door frame. Installs on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into brick. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Ring Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the best option when door swing or storm door  is critical. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for these models. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Fits Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (and compatible 2/3/3+/4 models). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates optional hardwiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket is replaceable for future upgrades (available here). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base (with Full Offset) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver (often orange, from doorbell box). Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure battery is charged but removed during install. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Hardwiring): Connect wires to your Ring Doorbell following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire. Attach Ring Doorbell: Take the main body of your Ring Doorbell (with battery removed, faceplate off). Align the mounting holes on the back of the doorbell body with the holes on the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the **doorbell body** to the Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1 driver). Do NOT use Ring's longer wall screws here. Re-install the battery (if not hardwired) and snap the Ring faceplate back on. Secure with Ring's security screw(s) at the bottom using the Ring screwdriver. Use correct drivers/tools for each screw type. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Entryway with the Ring Battery Doorbell Plus Brick Extension Optimal Placement for Your Doorbell Plus This Full Offset Brick Extension Mount is designed specifically to enhance the placement of your Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (and similar models). The full offset maximizes  from door swings and positions the doorbell optimally over the brick face for improved visibility and functionality. Durability and Reliability Crafted from durable, weather-resistant PETG, this extension mount withstands different conditions while ensuring your Doorbell Plus remains secure. It allows your doorbell to remain accessible and visible, giving your entryway a smart boost. Easy Installation Process Installing the extension onto existing trim is straightforward, avoiding masonry drilling. Our instructions guide you through attaching the base, adapter bracket, and your doorbell for a secure setup. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have a compatible Ring Removable Battery model (Plus, 2, 3, 3+, 4). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (or 2/3/4)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Doorbell 3 ( Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Ring Doorbells with REMOVABLE Battery ONLY! Fits ONLY: Ring models where the battery pack can be fully removed via a bottom/side cover. This includes: Ring Video Doorbell 3 / 3 Plus (Main Focus) Ring Video Doorbell 2 Ring Video Doorbell 4 (Does NOT fit Battery Doorbell Plus or Pro models, Integrated Battery Gen 1/2, or any Pro/Wired models) Confirm your model uses a removable battery & this mounting pattern: (Example Images - Click first for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Models with integrated batteries or Pro/Plus/Wired versions. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure? Send us a photo! Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Maximum Door  for Your Ring Doorbell 3 / 3+! Installing your Ring Doorbell (3/3+ or other removable battery model) on trim set back from brick? Is your door or storm door swing extremely close? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the maximum possible sideways ! It extends your doorbell forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell body entirely sideways over the brick face, creating vital space next to your door frame. Installs on trim >= 9/16" wide without drilling into brick. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Ring Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This pushes the doorbell horizontally as far as possible over the adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the perfect solution when door swing or storm door  is the primary concern. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for these models. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Fits Ring Removable Battery Models: Confirmed for Ring Video Doorbell 2, 3, 3 Plus, and 4. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates optional hardwiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket is replaceable for future doorbell upgrades (available here). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base (with Full Offset) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), Ring security screwdriver (often orange, from doorbell box). Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure battery is charged but removed during install. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max ). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Hardwiring): Connect wires to your Ring Doorbell following Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire. Attach Ring Doorbell: Take the main body of your Ring Doorbell (with battery removed, faceplate off). Align the mounting holes on the back of the doorbell body with the holes on the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Secure the **doorbell body** to the Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1 driver). Do NOT use Ring's longer wall screws here. Re-install the battery (if not hardwired) and snap the Ring faceplate back on. Secure with Ring's security screw(s) at the bottom using the Ring screwdriver. Use correct drivers/tools for each screw type. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have a compatible Ring Removable Battery model (2, 3, 3+, 4). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Doorbell (2, 3, 3+, 4)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

} .features ul { list-style: disc; } .benefits-section { margin-top: 20px; } .benefits-section h3 { color: #0056b3; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 5px; } .benefits-section p { margin-bottom: 1em; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Fixed 45° Corner Doorbell Mount (3/4" Narrow Base) | Select Your Model Designed for Corners & Slim Doorbells! Select Your Model. This mount provides a fixed **45-degree angle** and positions your doorbell approx. **1 inch forward from the corner**. Its **narrow 3/4-inch base** is ideal for tight corner installations. CRITICAL: You MUST Select Your Specific Doorbell Model from the options list for a perfectly matched top adapter bracket. Sizing Considerations (Due to 45° Angle & Base Offset): Best suited for doorbells **up to ~1.6 - 2 inches wide** (e.g., Ring Pro/Wired, Blink, Logitech, SimpliSafe, Google Nest Hello) when installed flush in a 90° corner. Wider doorbells (like Ring Battery models, ~2.5" wide) **WILL** require this mount to be installed **offset from the absolute corner** (e.g., 1/4" to 1" away from one corner edge, depending on doorbell width) to fit correctly. WALKWAY  WARNING: The 45° angle pushes the doorbell further out. On very narrow trim next to a door swing, part of the doorbell **may obstruct the walkway or be hit by the door**. Please carefully consider your space and send pictures for a fit assessment BEFORE ordering if you have any doubts. Enhance Your Home Security with the 45° Corner Mount Need to capture a wide view from a corner location? This **Fixed 45° Corner Mount** is designed precisely for that purpose. Its narrow 3/4" base allows installation in tight corners, while the fixed 45° angle directs your camera significantly outwards, ideal for monitoring approaches perpendicular to one of the corner walls. It also positions the doorbell approximately 1 inch forward from the corner vertex, helping clear some trim or frame obstructions. Select your doorbell model for a secure, custom fit. Mount Specifications Fixed Angle: Provides a **45-degree horizontal angle** (angled outward from the corner). Extension from Corner: Positions doorbell mounting surface approx. **1 inch forward** from the corner vertex (where walls meet). Base Wall Footprint Width: 3/4 inches (0.75"). Base Wall Footprint Length: Approx. 2.5 inches. Base Mounting Hole Spacing: Standard **2 inches** (center-to-center). (Customizable via add-on service). Effective Offset: Designed for doorbells < 2" wide to fit in corner; wider doorbells require mount offset (see compatibility). Key Features & Benefits: Wide 45° Fixed Outward Angle: Maximizes view down walls from corner installations. ~1" Forward Extension from Corner: Helps clear trim and improves visibility. Ultra-Narrow 3/4" Base: Fits 98% of tight corners and very slim door trim. Standard 2" Hole Spacing: Often matches existing doorbell button holes (customizable). Requires Doorbell Model Selection: Get the correct pre-drilled top adapter bracket. Internal Wire Passthrough: For a clean installation with wired doorbells. Durable PETG Construction: Weather-resistant, much stronger than PLA for outdoor use. Includes Assembly Screws: For connecting the adapter bracket to the mount base. Future-Proof System: Top adapter bracket is replaceable if you change doorbell models (available here). Installing Your 45° Fixed Corner Mount Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), selected doorbell & its hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Position & Mount Angled Base: Place the **45° Corner Base** snugly into the corner, ensuring the angle directs the doorbell correctly. Mark and drill pilot holes if needed. Secure the base to **one side** of the corner trim/wall using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors through the 2" spaced holes. Ensure base is level vertically. Do NOT overtighten wall screws. Check for door swing ! Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the **Doorbell Adapter Bracket** (specific to your model). Align onto the angled face of the Corner Base. Attach using small screws provided (likely #4 / PH1 driver). Tighten screws snugly until bracket is flush. Clear plastic debris if needed. Wire Doorbell: Connect wires per manufacturer's instructions. Tuck excess wire. Attach Doorbell to Adapter Bracket: Align your doorbell (or its specific backplate) with the holes on the custom Adapter Bracket. Secure doorbell/plate using small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (likely #4 / PH1). DO NOT USE doorbell's wall screws here. Replace doorbell cover/faceplate. Use correct PH1 driver. Tighten gently. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure & check door  again. Turn power on & test. Follow safety rules & doorbell guidelines. Use appropriate anchors. Smallest extension (~1" from corner) shipped unless custom requested (extra cost). Perfectly Positioned with Corner Mount The 45° Corner Mount enables installation in tight corners at a wide outward angle, ensuring optimal viewing angles. This is crucial for capturing a broad field of vision and seeing more of your entryway, especially approaches from the side. Durable and Slim Design The narrow 3/4" base minimizes visual clutter while fitting tight spaces. Made from robust, weather-resistant PETG, this mount stays securely in place, providing long-lasting performance and protection for your doorbell . Easy Installation and Versatile Fit Installing the Corner Mount is simple with its user-friendly design. It adapts to corners near trim or storm doors, providing a stable attachment point for many doorbell models (when selected). Optional Add-ons & Customizations: Enhance your installation: Customize Base Hole Spacing Need different spacing than the standard 2" for the base? Add this service and provide measurements. Further Extension from Corner Need more than the standard ~1" effective extension from the corner? Contact us for custom options (additional cost). Custom Color Standard Black (except SimpliSafe/Wyze default White). For other colors, add this service ($2-$5 charge applies). Visualization & Installation Help Product Image: Questions? Need Fit Confirmation or Customization? Please send pictures of your doorbell and mounting area if you're unsure about corner fit, especially with wider doorbells or tight door clearances! Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Default Color: Black (except SimpliSafe/Wyze usually White). For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 45° angled corner mount base, doorbell-specific top adapter bracket, and assembly screws. Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG (superior to PLA). 3D Printed Quality: While usually fantastic, minor cosmetic imperfections are inherent to 3D printing and don't affect function. We'll gladly replace if you're unhappy with quality. Order your 45° Fixed Corner Mount today for optimal viewing from tight corners! Remember to select your doorbell model and check sizing notes.
