margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Nest Doorbell (Battery) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Nest Doorbell (Battery/Wireless) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Google Nest Doorbell (Battery)** model (this model can also be wired). Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The Nest Hello (Wired 1st Gen) or the Nest Doorbell (Wired 2nd Gen). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure which Nest model you have? Please send us a picture before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your Nest Doorbell (Battery)! Is your Nest Doorbell (Battery version) mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum space to avoid your door or storm door hitting it? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the ultimate sideways shift for these tight spots! It extends your Nest doorbell forward past the brick (select the required length) and uses our unique **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, creating maximum . Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Nest Doorbell (Battery) attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the best choice when maximum  from a door swing or storm door is absolutely necessary. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Nest Doorbell (Battery). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Tailored Fit: Specifically designed for Google Nest Doorbell (Battery / Wireless). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates optional wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Nest Doorbell (Battery) This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Nest Doorbell's wall plate & release tool. Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Ensure doorbell is charged. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Nest Battery). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Nest Wall Plate: Secure the **wall plate that came WITH your Nest Doorbell (Battery)** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure it's oriented correctly. Do NOT use Nest's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Nest Doorbell: Connect wires (if hardwiring) to the Nest wall plate following Google Nest instructions. Carefully slide and click the Nest Doorbell (Battery) onto its wall plate until it locks securely. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. (Use Nest release tool if removal is needed). Follow safety rules & Google Nest guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Google Nest Doorbell Installation Why Choose the Google Nest Doorbell Wireless Brick Mount Extension? This Full Offset Brick Extension provides an ideal solution for mounting your Nest Doorbell (Battery) near brick. It allows you to position your doorbell effectively, ensuring you capture clear views and never miss a visitor, even with tight door clearances. Key Features of the Narrow Extending Design This mount features a narrow 9/16" base suitable for most trim. The full offset enhances placement options and home aesthetics without sacrificing functionality. Durable PETG construction ensures it withstands weather, maintaining integrity for years. Installation Tips for Optimal Use Install this mount onto your existing trim, avoiding difficult brick drilling. Use the measurement guide for perfect extension length. Proper alignment using the full offset ensures the best camera angles for enhanced property monitoring. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Nest Doorbell (Battery version). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors (like White to match Nest), add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Nest Doorbell (Battery)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

- [Arlo 2k Gen2 Video Doorbell Brick Extension - 9/16in Wide Base - Offset Extend Over Side of Brick](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/arlo-2k-gen2-video-doorbell-brick-extension-9-16in-wide-base-offset-extend-over-side-of-brick): This mount is a fixed extension mount to Enhancing Security with Arlo 2k Gen2 Video Doorbell Brick Extension In cases where the Arlo 2k doorbell is located behind a thick brick wall or other obstruction, the extension can be used to move the button or doorbell to a location where it is visible and opposite the door. It is available in various extension lengths. If you cant mount your doorbell flat, or if something is in the way of the view, you can use this mount to correct it. These mounts allow for wires to pass through the center. This is made to put the doorbell past the bricks if your doorbell is mounted to trim. It offsets the doorbell away from the door and slightly over the bricks and away from the door. So if doorbell is too close to the swing of the door, this is what you will need.(PICTURE OF DOORBELL MAY NOT MATCH THE DOORBELL MODEL SHOWN ON THE LISTING - DOORBELL NOT INCLUDED, THIS LISTING IS MADE TO FIT THE DOORBELL MODEL IN THE TITLE OF THIS LISTING ONLY) This Mount fits this Doorbell found on Amazon ( link below) This mount is 9/16in wide, and will fit in most spots. This is a FULL OFFSET - that moves the doorbell the farthest over the brick and away from the door. I have options to fully offset the doorbell all the way to the edge of the mount if necessary. This mount is 9/16in wide, and will fit in most spots. Be sure to send me a picture of your doorbell and where you want to mount it. All my mounts have holes to allow for wire passthrough. If you have a gap where you hole for your doorbell wire is far from your brick, you have a few options. You can 1. Install a Bottom Filler Spacer Plate - Also Correct Angled Trim too in Combination. 2. Provide a bottom Mouse Hole in the Brick Extension 3. Add Body Shim Filler Plate ****While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, there are often imperfections that may be found on the prints. These do not impair the function and rarely affect the aesthetics. But if your not happy with the quality, please text, email, or message me before leaving a review. Optimize Your Video Quality The Arlo 2k Gen2 Video Doorbell ensures a clear picture and captures every detail. However, proper installation is crucial to achieving optimal viewing angles. This Brick Extension is designed with a 9/16 inch wide base, allowing it to extend over the side of bricks. As a result, you won't miss any important moments at your doorstep, making it a fantastic choice for home security. Easy Installation and Durable Design Installation is straightforward with the Arlo Brick Extension, which seamlessly fits onto most brick surfaces. You simply align it with your existing doorbell mount and secure it with the included hardware. Because it’s made from durable materials, you can trust that it will withstand various weather conditions, ensuring reliable performance year-round. Versatile for Any Home Style Not only does the Arlo 2k Gen2 Video Doorbell Brick Extension improve functionality, but it also complements various architectural styles. Whether you have a modern home or a traditional brick façade, this extension blends in beautifully. So, you can enhance your home's security without compromising its aesthetic appeal.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Ring Doorbell Gen 2 (2020) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max Door  Compatibility: Ring Doorbell (Gen 2 - 2020, Integrated Battery) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The Ring Video Doorbell (2nd Generation) released in 2020. This model has an **integrated (non-removable) battery** and charges via the orange button on the back. Also fits original Gen 1 model with integrated battery. Confirm your model matches the picture below (Note: requires the small plastic bracket shown below that comes *with the doorbell*): (Example Images - Click first for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Ring models with REMOVABLE batteries (Ring 2, 3, 4, Battery Plus/Pro), or ANY Pro/Pro 2/Wired models. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide. Confused by Ring models? Check our Ring Model Guide or contact us! Get Maximum Door  for Your Ring Gen 2! Is your Ring Doorbell (Gen 2, 2020 model) mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Is your door swing or storm door extremely close, requiring the absolute maximum sideways ? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is engineered specifically for this tightest of spots! It extends your doorbell forward past the brick while shifting it as far sideways as possible over the brick face, aligning the edge of the doorbell with the edge of the mount base. Mounts easily to your existing trim (minimum 9/16" wide). How it Works: Full Offset for Maximum Shift This mount features our unique FULL OFFSET design. This means the entire doorbell body is positioned beside the narrow base, flush with the door-facing edge of the mount. This pushes the doorbell horizontally as far as possible over the brick, providing significantly more  than our Standard Offset versions. Choose this FULL OFFSET version when every fraction of an inch matters for door swing . This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face, not flush with it. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need less offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version (requires >=9/16" trim). Base Dimensions & Mounting: The mounting base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure adequate flat mounting surface on trim. Use appropriate screws for trim material (not included for wall attachment). Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15° Options) to correct the angle (sold separately). CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choosing the correct extension length ensures the mount clears your brickwork. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture of your setup! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: "Full Offset" design provides the most  possible from door swings. Perfect Fit: For Ring Video Doorbell Gen 2 (2020, Integrated Battery) & Gen 1. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick Face measurement). Narrow Base Option: Standard base is 9/16" wide for tight fits. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel for optional hardwiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, angle adapters, fillers etc. Future-Proof Base: Compatible with replacement brackets for future doorbell upgrades (available here). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base (with Full Offset) and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your **Ring Doorbell's plastic mounting bracket & security screws/tool**. Turn OFF power at the breaker if hardwiring! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base on your trim (ensure Full Offset side provides maximum  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Drill pilot holes. Don't overtighten base screws. Ensure base is level. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Align onto the Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush and secure. Check for/clear plastic debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Wire Doorbell (If Applicable): Connect wires to your Ring Doorbell Gen 2 per Ring's instructions. Tuck excess wire. Attach Ring Doorbell: First, securely screw the plastic mounting bracket that came WITH YOUR RING DOORBELL onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (likely #4 / PH1). Then, clip/attach your Ring Doorbell (Gen 2) onto **its own bracket**. Secure with Ring's security screws (using Ring's tool) at the bottom. Do NOT use Ring's long wall screws here. Use correct driver sizes. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & Ring's guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim to ensure your extension points straight out. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the base for side-exiting wires. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ring models are tricky! Ensure you have the Gen 2 (2020, Integrated Battery). Need help measuring or choosing options (Full vs Standard Offset)? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Ring Doorbell Gen 2! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-bottom: 20px;} .installation-steps h2 { color: #155724; margin-top: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #c3e6cb; padding-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps ol { padding-left: 1.5em; margin-top: 1em;} .installation-steps li { margin-bottom: 1em; } .installation-steps ul { list-style-type: disc; margin-top: 0.5em; margin-left: 1em; padding-left: 1em;} .installation-steps ul li { margin-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps .step-note { margin-top: 0.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #000; padding: 10px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: block; } .warning-box strong { color: #721c24; } /* Standard Sections (Default Background) */ .product-info { margin-bottom: 20px; } .features ul { list-style: disc; } .benefits-section { margin-top: 20px; } .benefits-section h3 { color: #0056b3; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 5px; } .benefits-section p { margin-bottom: 1em; height: auto; margin: 10px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #ccc;} .media-section .image-gallery { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .media-section .image-gallery img { max-width: 198px; flex: 0 1 198px;} .media-section a { display: block; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; } /* Contact Info Box Style (Light Grey) */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Adjustable Angle Doorbell Mount (0-35°) | Select Your Model Select Your Doorbell Model for a Perfect Fit! You MUST select your specific Doorbell Model and Brand from the options list on this page. We provide a custom-designed mounting bracket tailored to your selection. This mount system is compatible with many popular video doorbells (Ring, Nest, Eufy, Wyze, Blink, Reolink, etc.). Unsure of your model? Many brands have confusing names! Please message, email, or text us a picture of your doorbell before ordering. (Contact info below). Model Not Listed? We specialize in custom solutions! Contact us with your doorbell details, and we can likely add it for you. Need help identifying a Ring model? Check our Ring Model Guide. Fine-Tune Your Doorbell View with 0-35° Swivel Adjustment Need a slight angle adjustment to get the perfect view from your video doorbell? This low-profile swivel mount offers precise aiming control with a 0° to 35° adjustment range. Its versatile dual-axis joint allows fine-tuning both horizontally (left/right) and vertically (up/down). It's the ideal solution when your doorbell is mounted near the door on the same wall but needs a subtle turn, or requires a minor tilt on angled siding. Its design sits closer to the wall compared to higher-angle mounts, offering a clean aesthetic. Precise Dual-Axis Control (0-35°) Gain exact control over your camera's perspective. The smooth swivel joint enables fine adjustments across a 0° to 35° arc relative to the mounting surface, ensuring you capture precisely what matters. Flexible Base Positioning: Mount the base plate vertically or horizontally to best suit your surface, like siding or trim. Your doorbell always remains upright. Standard Mount Dimensions Base Width: 1.8 inches Base Height: 3.1 inches Base Hole Spacing: 2-5/8 inches (center-to-center) Total Extension (@ 0° Angle): Approx. 1.5 inches from wall (low profile) (Note: This is the standard base; narrow/larger base options may be available - see Customization section.) Key Features & Benefits: Adjustable Angle (0-35°): Provides subtle dual-axis swivel for precise aiming. Custom Fit Bracket: Select your doorbell model for a perfectly matched mounting bracket. Secure Locking: Includes set screws to lock the swivel at your chosen angle. Wire Pass-Through: Hole in the swivel joint allows wires to pass through neatly for hardwired doorbells. Siding Compatible: Works well on flat surfaces or lapped siding up to 1.8 inches wide. Low-Profile Design: Minimal extension from the wall. Complete Kit: Includes adjustable base, custom doorbell bracket, and all necessary mounting screws. Durable Material: Made from sturdy 3D printed PETG, suitable for outdoor use. Future-Proof System: Many of our mounts use a universal base! If you upgrade your doorbell model later, you often only need a new, affordable adapter bracket (the part your doorbell attaches to), not a whole new mount system. Find replacement brackets here (approx. $10). Customization & Add-On Options Available: We offer solutions for almost any mounting situation (may require contacting us or finding separate listings): Narrow Baseplates: Need to mount on trim narrower than 1.8"? We have options like our 3/4 inch Wide Baseplate. Large Baseplates: Need to cover a large existing hole from an old intercom or doorbell? Contact us for options. Vinyl Siding Adapters: Get a secure, no-drill installation on vinyl siding with our Vinyl Siding Adapters. Wire Extensions: Installation requires longer wires? Contact us about wire extension kits. Wider Angle Needed? Check out our 15-90 Degree Swivel Mounts for perpendicular wall installations. Custom Designs: Have a unique challenge? We specialize in custom solutions! Installing Your 0-35° Swivel Mount Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill (with bits). Screwdrivers/Bits: PH2 Philips (#6 base screws) AND PH1 Philips (typically #4 bracket/set/doorbell screws provided). Use correct size! Wall anchors (if needed), Level (optional). If wiring, turn OFF power at the circuit breaker first! Mount Base: Route wires through base. Position (screws vertical or horizontal) & attach using #6 screws (PH2 driver) / anchors. Drill pilot holes if needed. Don't overtighten base screws. Attach Swivel Bracket: Route wires through bracket. Align onto base & attach using four center screws (likely #4 / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Start screws gently. Avoid overtightening. Set Initial Angle: Adjust swivel bracket (up/down & left/right) within 0-35°. Lightly tighten one/two set screws (likely #4 / PH1 driver). Wire Doorbell: Connect wires per manufacturer's instructions (if applicable). Tuck excess wire into mount. Attach Doorbell to Bracket: Align your selected doorbell model (or its plate if used) with the pre-drilled holes on the custom swivel mount bracket sent for your model. Secure doorbell/plate using the specific screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (likely #4 / PH1 driver). DO NOT USE screws that came with your doorbell for this step. Replace doorbell cover if applicable. Use correct PH1 driver for provided screws. Tighten snugly, do not overtighten. Finalize & Secure Angle: Make final adjustments. Fully tighten all set screws (likely PH1 driver) gently but firmly. Do not overtighten set screws! Hand-tighten is sufficient. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & your doorbell's guidelines. Use appropriate anchors. Correct Philips bit size prevents damage. Installation Video & Examples Watch: Swivel Doorbell Installation Video (Video shows general installation principles for our swivel mounts.) Questions? Need Help Selecting Your Model or Options? We're here to help! If you're unsure about your doorbell model, need a custom solution, or your model isn't listed, please reach out: Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text pictures!) Standard Color: Ships in Black. For other colors, please purchase the separate Color Change Request listing along with this mount. Angle Note: The maximum 35-degree angle is approximate and may vary slightly depending on installation and doorbell model. 3D Printed Parts: While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be present. These do not affect the mount's strength or function. If you have any quality concerns, please contact us before leaving a review. Order your Adjustable Angle Mount today! Remember to select your doorbell model for a perfect fit and achieve the ideal viewing angle!

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Lorex Doorbell (2k/4k/1080p) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility Check: Lorex Doorbells & Trim Width Fits Lorex Models: Lorex 2k QHD Wired Video Doorbell (B463AJ Series) Lorex 4k UHD Wired Video Doorbell (B862AJDB Series) Lorex 1080p Wired Doorbell (ACCHM1 Series - **2-Screw mounting version ONLY**) Confirm your model matches the picture below (Example shows 4k, fits others listed): (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The Lorex 1080p model with **3** mounting screws, or doorbells from other brands. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please double-check your Lorex model and mounting screw pattern before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your Lorex Doorbell! Is your Lorex 2k, 4k, or 1080p (2-screw) Doorbell mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum  for a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the ultimate sideways shift! It extends your Lorex doorbell forward past the brick (select the required length) and uses our unique **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face. Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Lorex Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the best choice when maximum  from a door swing or storm door is critical. The offset is reversible for left or right side mounting. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for Lorex Doorbells. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Fits Lorex Doorbells: Compatible with 2k, 4k, and 1080p (2-screw version) models. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates Lorex wiring. Reversible Offset: Base can be flipped for left or right offset. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Lorex This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Lorex doorbell mounting plate & hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Lorex). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Lorex Backplate: Secure the **mounting plate that came WITH your Lorex Doorbell** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure correct orientation. Do NOT use Lorex's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Lorex Doorbell: Connect wires to the Lorex backplate following Lorex instructions. Mount the Lorex Doorbell unit onto its backplate. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Lorex guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Lorex Doorbell with Our Unique Brick Extension Seamless Installation for Your Lorex Doorbell This Full Offset brick extension is designed specifically for Lorex 2k/4k/1080p(2-screw) doorbells near brickwork. It ensures your doorbell sits perfectly extended past the brick face, crucial for optimal camera and sensor performance without compromising aesthetics. Custom Fit for Unique Architectural Features The full offset design allows you to adapt to challenging recessed trim situations, especially where door swing  is minimal. This ensures your doorbell functions effectively while integrating beautifully with your home's exterior. Durability and Style Combined Made from high-quality PETG, this extension withstands various weather conditions while maintaining its appearance. It complements your Lorex doorbell, providing both functionality and style for long-lasting home security. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Custom Color Standard color is Black. For White, Brown, Grey, etc., add this service. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the correct Lorex Doorbell model (2k, 4k, or 1080p 2-screw). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Lorex Doorbell! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

- [Ring Battery Doorbell PRO Brick Extension - 9/16in Wide - FULL Offset Over Side of Brick](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/ring-battery-doorbell-pro-brick-extension-9-16in-wide-full-offset-over-side-of-brick): This mount is a fixed Brick extension mount to Fit Ring Battery Doorbell PRO (also fit all Ring models with Removable Batteries including Ring 2/3/3+/4) Newest 2024 Doorbell. FULL OFFSET - So the doorbell is farthest away from the door as possible. This Mount fits this Doorbell found on Amazon ( link below) Fits doorbell with removable bottom cover This is made to put the doorbell past the bricks if your doorbell is mounted to trim. It offsets the doorbell over the bricks and away from the door. So if doorbell is too close to the swing of the door, this is what you will need. Different Extesnsion Lengths starting at 1/4in. THIS IS THE FULL OFFSET --- FULL OFFSET MEANS THE DOORBELL IS FLUSH WITH THE SIDE OF THE MOUNT AND IS AS FAR OVER THE BRICKS AS POSSIBLE. If you dont need the full offset and you want an extension that is about $10 cheaper the standard offset leaves about 5/8in on the door side. The listing can be found by clicking the picture below: If you have angled trim you can get angled shims to make sure your brick extension is perpendicular: If you need an angle adapter or want to add swivel piece to end of the extension click the following picture: If you have a gap where you hole for your doorbell wire is far from your brick, you have a few options. You can 1. Install a Bottom Filler Spacer Plate - Also Correct Angled Trim too in Combination. 2. Provide a bottom Mouse Hole in the Brick Extension 3. Add Body Shim Filler Plate This Mount fits this Doorbell found on Amazon ( link below) NORMAL COLOR is Black, if you need to purchase a different color, there will be a color change request listing to change the color. Enhance Your Doorbell Experience with PRO Brick Extension Be sure to send me a picture of your doorbell and where you want to mount it. Message me by email at shop@doorbellmount.com or text me at 833-326-6868. All my mounts have holes to allow for wire passthrough. ****While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, there are often imperfections that may be found on the prints. These do not impair the function and rarely affect the aesthetics. But if your not happy with the quality, please text, email, or message me before leaving a review. Install with Ease The Ring Battery Doorbell PRO Brick Extension offers a simple solution for mounting your doorbell securely onto brick surfaces. Its design allows for a full offset from the side of the brick, ensuring that your doorbell is not only positioned perfectly but is also easily accessible. Because it's only 9/16 inches wide, it blends seamlessly with the brick, making it an ideal choice for homeowners looking for functionality without compromising aesthetics. Versatile Application Designed to fit various brick styles, the PRO Brick Extension allows for versatile installation options. You can mount your Ring doorbell at the optimal height for your needs, ensuring you capture the best video footage of visitors. This product is extremely beneficial, especially in homes with non-standard brick setups, as it offers flexibility in positioning where traditional mounts might fall short. Durability Meets Functionality Durability is a key feature of the Ring PRO Brick Extension. Constructed from high-quality materials, it is designed to withstand the elements, ensuring that your doorbell remains securely in place across all seasons. This reliability is crucial, especially because outdoor installations face various weather challenges. So with the PRO Brick Extension, you're making a wise  for long-term security and convenience of your home.

} .installation-steps ul { list-style-type: disc; margin-top: 0.5em; margin-left: 1em; padding-left: 1em;} .installation-steps ul li { margin-bottom: 0.5em;} .installation-steps .step-note { margin-top: 0.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; } .features ul { list-style: disc; } .benefits-section { margin-top: 20px; } /* Added this class based on example usage, applying to features */ .benefits-section h3 { /* Applied style to Features H3 based on Benefits example */ color: #0056b3; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Adjustable 90-Degree Corner Mount | Side Wall Solution Select Your Doorbell Model for a Perfect Fit! You MUST select your specific Doorbell Model and Brand from the options list on this page. We provide a custom-designed mounting bracket tailored to your selection for this 90-degree mount. This mount system is compatible with many popular video doorbells (Ring, Nest, Eufy, Wyze, Blink, Reolink, etc.). Unsure of your model? Many brands have confusing names! Please message, email, or text us a picture of your doorbell before ordering. (Contact info below). Model Not Listed? We specialize in custom solutions! Contact us with your doorbell details, and we can likely add it for you. Need help identifying a Ring model? Check our Ring Model Guide. Solve Awkward Side Wall Views with 15-90° Swivel Adjustment Is your video doorbell stuck on a side wall perpendicular to your door, giving you a view of the wall instead of your visitors? This Adjustable 90-Degree Corner Mount is engineered specifically for this challenge! It offers a wide 15° to 90° adjustment range, allowing you to pivot your doorbell outwards for a perfect view down your pathway or towards your gate. It's the ultimate solution for perpendicular wall installations where standard mounts or simple wedges just don't provide enough angle. Wide Angle Dual-Axis Control (15-90°) Designed for significant angle correction, this mount features a unique bent-neck swivel joint. It provides precise aiming control across a 15° to 90° arc relative to the wall, ideal for side-facing views (excels at angles greater than 45°). Fine-tuning is possible both horizontally (left/right) and vertically (up/down). Note: While adjustable across the range, this design is optimized for substantial side angles and is less suited if you only need a very minor (<15°) adjustment or a straight-ahead view. Standard Mount Dimensions Base Width: 1.8 inches Base Height: 3.1 inches Base Hole Spacing: 2-5/8 inches (center-to-center) Total Extension: Varies with angle; greater than low-profile mounts due to the 90-degree design. (Note: This is the standard base; narrow/larger base options may be available - see Customization section.) Key Features & Benefits: Wide Adjustable Angle (15-90°): Provides significant dual-axis swivel specifically for side wall / perpendicular installations. Custom Fit Bracket: Select your doorbell model for a perfectly matched mounting bracket. Secure Locking: Includes set screws to lock the swivel firmly at your chosen angle. Wire Pass-Through: Hole in the swivel joint allows wires to pass through neatly for hardwired doorbells. Siding Compatible: Works well on flat surfaces or lapped siding up to 1.8 inches wide. Complete Kit: Includes adjustable base, custom doorbell bracket, and all necessary mounting screws. Durable Material: Made from sturdy 3D printed PETG, suitable for outdoor use. Problem Solver: Eliminates the "side wall view" issue for better security coverage. Future-Proof System (Potential): Base may be compatible with future doorbell adapter brackets (check compatibility if upgrading). Find replacement brackets here (approx. $10). Customization & Add-On Options Available: We offer solutions for almost any mounting situation (may require contacting us or finding separate listings): Narrow Baseplates: Need to mount on trim narrower than 1.8"? We have options like our 3/4 inch Wide Baseplate. Large Baseplates: Need to cover a large existing hole? Contact us for options. Vinyl Siding Adapters: Get a secure, no-drill installation on vinyl siding with our Vinyl Siding Adapters (check compatibility). Wire Extensions: Installation requires longer wires? Contact us about wire extension kits. Need LESS Angle? Check out our 0-35 Degree Swivel Mounts for subtle adjustments. Custom Designs: Have a unique challenge? We specialize in custom solutions! Installing Your 15-90° Swivel Mount Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill (with bits). Screwdrivers/Bits: PH2 Philips (#6 base screws) AND PH1 Philips (typically #4 bracket/set/doorbell screws provided). Use correct size! Wall anchors (if needed), Level (optional). If wiring, turn OFF power at the circuit breaker first! Mount Base: Route wires through base. Position & attach using #6 screws (PH2 driver) / anchors. Drill pilot holes if needed. Don't overtighten base screws. Attach Swivel Bracket: Route wires through bracket. Align onto base & attach using four center screws (likely #4 / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Start screws gently. Avoid overtightening. Set Initial Angle: Adjust swivel bracket (up/down & left/right) within 15-90°. Lightly tighten one/two set screws (likely #4 / PH1 driver). Wire Doorbell: Connect wires per manufacturer's instructions (if applicable). Tuck excess wire into mount. Attach Doorbell to Bracket: Align your selected doorbell model (or its plate if used) with the pre-drilled holes on the custom swivel mount bracket sent for your model. Secure doorbell/plate using the specific screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (likely #4 / PH1 driver). DO NOT USE screws that came with your doorbell for this step. Replace doorbell cover if applicable. Use correct PH1 driver for provided screws. Tighten snugly, do not overtighten. Finalize & Secure Angle: Make final adjustments. Fully tighten all set screws (likely PH1 driver) gently but firmly. Do not overtighten set screws! Hand-tighten is sufficient. Turn power back on (if applicable) and test. Follow safety rules & your doorbell's guidelines. Use appropriate anchors. Correct Philips bit size prevents damage. Installation Video & Examples Watch: Swivel Doorbell Installation Video (Video shows general installation principles for our swivel mounts.) Questions? Need Help Selecting Your Model or Options? We're here to help! If you're unsure about your doorbell model, need a custom solution for your 90-degree install, or your model isn't listed, please reach out: Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text pictures!) Standard Color: Ships in Black. For other colors, select a different color Angle Note: The term "90 degrees" represents the approximate maximum capability for perpendicular installations. The achievable angle depends on positioning, but this mount is designed to provide substantial correction (15-90°) for side walls. 3D Printed Parts: While 3D printing provides really good production quality parts, minor cosmetic variations or layer lines may be present. These do not affect the mount's strength or function. If you have any quality concerns, please contact us before leaving a review. Order your Adjustable 90-Degree Corner Mount today! Remember to select your doorbell model for a perfect fit and finally get the right view from your side-mounted doorbell!

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Blink Doorbell Centered Brick Face Extension Mount (Flush Fit) Compatibility: Blink Doorbell & Trim Width Fits ONLY: The standard **Blink Video Doorbell**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Any other Blink cameras or doorbells from other brands (Ring, Nest, etc.). CRITICAL TRIM WIDTH: This is a **CENTERED** mount. Your mounting surface (trim) **MUST be at least ~1.4 inches wide** (the width of the Blink doorbell itself) to fully support the doorbell without it overhanging the edges of the trim. For narrower trim, please choose an "Offset" mount. Please double-check your Blink model and trim width before ordering! Send us a picture if unsure. Position Your Blink Doorbell Flush with Brick! (Requires Wide Trim) Want the cleanest possible look for your Blink Video Doorbell when mounted on trim recessed behind brick? This **Centered Brick Face Extension Mount** aims to position the **front face** of your doorbell approximately **flush with the surrounding brick surface**. It extends straight forward (centered, no offset) by the length you select using the specific "Face Flush" measurement method. Remember, your trim must be wide enough (~1.4") to support the full width of the Blink doorbell for this centered mount. Avoids drilling into masonry! How it Works: Centered Extension for "Face Flush" This mount provides a STRAIGHT, CENTERED extension (no sideways offset). It's designed to bring the doorbell mounting point forward from recessed trim. The goal with the recommended measurement (see guide below) is to have the **FRONT FACE of your Blink Doorbell** sit approximately **FLUSH** with the outer surface of your brickwork for the most integrated look possible. If your trim is narrower than ~1.4 inches, please choose an "Offset Brick Extension" for Blink instead. Base Dimensions & Mounting: This extension base is likely **3/4 inches wide** (confirm if different base width needed). Standard mounting hole spacing is typically **2 inches** (center-to-center) for fixed/centered mounts. Ensure solid mounting surface at least ~1.4 inches wide. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your wide trim is angled, standard Angle Shims may not fit the 3/4" base. Please contact us to discuss custom shim options. CRITICAL: Measure for Extension Length (Face Flush Goal)! To achieve the Face Flush goal, select the extension length on this product page based on the following: Preferred Method (More Accurate): Measure TRIM to BRICK FACE. Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (We internally account for the doorbell/bracket thickness based on this measurement to target a face-flush result). Example: If your bricks are 3 inches deep from the trim, select "3 inches" as the Extension Length. Alternate Method (If you have doorbell): Hold doorbell face flush with brick. Measure from trim surface to **back mounting points** of doorbell. Order this length. (This method provides ultimate precision). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure from Trim to Brick Face (Method 1) or use Method 2 for best "Face Flush" result. Key Features & Benefits: Tailored for Blink Video Doorbell: Ensures correct fit and adapter plate. Centered Design: Extends doorbell straight forward (no sideways offset). "Face Flush" Goal: Aims to align doorbell front face with the brick surface plane. Requires Wide Trim (>= ~1.4"): Ensure your mounting surface is wide enough for the doorbell itself. Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth using Trim-to-Brick measurement. Narrow Base (Likely 3/4" Wide): Fits standard trim widths (but requires overall width for doorbell). Standard 2" Base Hole Spacing: Often matches existing button holes (customizable). Wire Passthrough: Internal channel (less critical for battery-powered Blink, but available). Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: May work with specific fillers or custom shims. Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable (check compatibility). How to Install Your Centered Extension for Blink This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Blink doorbell backplate & hardware. Ensure doorbell batteries are installed. Turn OFF power at breaker if attempting optional wiring. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length, centered) on your trim (ensure trim is >= ~1.4" wide) over any wires. Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2" spaced holes (verify spacing). Ensure base is level. Do not overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires (if any) through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Blink). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Tighten screws snugly until bracket is flush. Clear debris if needed. Attach Blink Backplate: Secure the **backplate that came WITH your Blink Doorbell** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure correct orientation. Do NOT use Blink's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Mount Blink Doorbell: Connect wires (if applicable) to the Blink backplate following Blink's instructions. Click the Blink Doorbell unit firmly onto its backplate until secure. Final Check: Ensure doorbell is secure and test functionality. Follow safety rules & Blink guidelines. Use appropriate anchors/screws. Ensure trim is wide enough to support doorbell width (~1.4"). Why Choose the Blink Doorbell Brick Extension? Perfect Fit for Brick Surfaces This Centered Brick Extension is specifically designed for installing your Blink Doorbell on trim near brickwork, aiming for a flush-face appearance. It provides a stable foundation when your trim is sufficiently wide (~1.4" or more). Easy Installation Process Installing this extension onto qualifying wide trim is straightforward. Follow the instructions to mount the base, attach the adapter, select your length (based on Trim-to-Brick measurement), and mount your Blink doorbell for a clean, integrated look. Durable Construction for Outdoor Use Made from high-quality, weather-resistant PETG, this extension ensures longevity and protects your Blink doorbell from the elements year-round. Optional Add-ons & Customizations: Enhance your installation: Customize Base Hole Spacing Need different spacing than the standard 2" for the base? Add this service. Need More Extension? If the selectable lengths aren't enough, contact us for custom length options. Custom Color Standard Black. Add this service for White, Brown, Grey, etc. Product Visualization This Mount fits this Doorbell ( Link): (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Confirm your trim is wide enough (~1.4") for this centered mount! Need help measuring for the "Face Flush" extension length? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. Trim Width Requirement: This CENTERED mount requires your trim/mounting surface to be at least ~1.4 inches wide to fully support the Blink doorbell. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns. Order the Centered Brick Face Extension for your Blink Doorbell today! Ensure your trim is wide enough, measure carefully using Trim-to-Brick distance for the Face Flush goal, and select your required extension length.

font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} .installation-steps .final-note { margin-top: 1.5em; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Warning Box Style - LIGHT RED with BLACK BORDER */ .warning-box { color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #000; padding: 10px; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; border-radius: 3px; display: block; } .warning-box strong { color: #721c24; } /* Add-ons Section Style - LIGHT PURPLE */ .add-ons { background-color: #f2e7fe; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #d6bbf1; border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 20px;} .add-ons h2 { color: #563d7c; margin-top: 0; } .add-ons ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; } .add-ons li { border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px; } .add-ons li:last-child { border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; } .add-ons img { max-height: 100px; width: auto; max-width: 250px; flex-shrink: 0; border: 1px solid #eee; vertical-align: middle; } .add-ons .addon-info { flex-grow: 1; } .add-ons .addon-info p { margin-top: 3px; font-size: 0.9em; } .add-ons a { text-decoration: none; color: #563d7c; font-weight: bold;} .add-ons a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } /* Media Section Style */ .media-section { margin: 20px 0; text-align: center; } .media-section h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .media-section img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 10px 0; border: 1px solid #eee;} .media-section p { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;} /* Contact Info Box Style (Light Grey) */ .contact-info { margin-top: 25px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Xfinity Doorbell Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Xfinity Video Doorbell ONLY! Fits ONLY: The standard **Xfinity Video Doorbell**. Confirm your model by visiting the link below or sending us a picture: WILL NOT FIT: Doorbells from other brands (Ring, Nest, Eufy, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please double-check your doorbell model before ordering! Enhance Your Home Security with the Xfinity Doorbell Brick Extension Is your Xfinity Video Doorbell installed on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum  from a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the solution! It extends your Xfinity doorbell forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our unique **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space. Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Xfinity Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the best choice when maximum  from a door swing or storm door is critical. The offset is reversible for left or right installation. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Xfinity Doorbell. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design provides ultimate door swing . Designed for Xfinity Video Doorbell: Ensures compatibility with the standard Xfinity model. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for standard trim widths. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel neatly accommodates wiring. Reversible Offset: Base can be flipped for left or right installation. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Xfinity This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Xfinity doorbell & its mounting hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Xfinity). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Xfinity Backplate: Secure the **mounting plate that came WITH your Xfinity Doorbell** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure correct orientation. Do NOT use Xfinity's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Xfinity Doorbell: Connect wires to the Xfinity backplate following Xfinity's instructions. Mount the Xfinity Doorbell unit onto its backplate. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Xfinity guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Seamless Installation for Your Xfinity Doorbell The Xfinity Doorbell Full Offset Brick Extension simplifies installation near brickwork. Featuring a 9/16-inch wide base and maximum sideways offset, it provides a stable foundation ensuring your doorbell sits perfectly past the brick edge for optimal performance and aesthetics. Durable Design Made from high-quality PETG, this extension withstands various weather conditions. Its robust construction ensures your doorbell remains securely mounted, providing reliable functionality and long-lasting durability against the elements. Perfect Fit for Xfinity Doorbell This brick extension is designed specifically to accommodate the Xfinity Video Doorbell, ensuring necessary support and perfect alignment. Its thoughtful design allows for seamless integration with your home security system and exterior. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Custom Color Standard color is Black. For White, Brown, Grey, etc., add this service. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the standard Xfinity Video Doorbell. Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Xfinity Video Doorbell! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Wyze Doorbell V2 Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Wyze Video Doorbell V2 ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Wyze Video Doorbell V2**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The Wyze Video Doorbell Pro or any other Wyze camera/doorbell model. Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please ensure you have the correct Wyze model before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your Wyze Doorbell V2! Is your Wyze Doorbell V2 mounted on trim that's recessed behind brick? Need maximum  from a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is designed specifically for these challenging spots! It extends your Wyze V2 forward past the brick (select the required length) and uses our unique **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space next to your door frame. Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your Wyze Doorbell V2 attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the best choice when maximum  from a door swing or storm door is critical. The offset is reversible for left or right side mounting. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Wyze Doorbell V2. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design provides ultimate door swing . Tailored for Wyze Doorbell V2: Ensures compatibility with this specific Wyze model. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates Wyze V2 wiring. Reversible Offset: Base can be flipped for left or right offset. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Wyze V2 This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Wyze Doorbell V2 wall plate & hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Wyze V2). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Wyze Wall Plate: Secure the **wall plate that came WITH your Wyze Doorbell V2** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure correct orientation. Do NOT use Wyze's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Wyze V2 Doorbell: Connect wires to the Wyze wall plate following Wyze instructions. Click the Wyze Doorbell V2 unit firmly onto its wall plate until secure. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & Wyze guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Wyze Doorbell Installation Perfect Fit for Brick Surfaces The Wyze Doorbell Brick Extension is designed specifically for homes with brick surfaces near trim. This extension features a 9/16 inch narrow base and a full offset design, allowing you to mount your Wyze Doorbell V2 securely even with tight clearances, ensuring it functions properly and looks integrated. Simple Installation Process Installing the Wyze Doorbell Brick Extension is straightforward onto existing trim. Easy-to-follow instructions enable quick setup without needing professional help, enhancing your security system efficiently. A Durable Choice for Outdoor Use Built from robust PETG plastic, the Wyze Doorbell Brick Extension withstands outdoor conditions, protecting your doorbell from weather elements and ensuring long-lasting, reliable performance. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Custom Color Standard color is Black (Default White for Wyze). Use this listing for other colors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Wyze Doorbell V2 (Not Pro). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: White (to match Wyze). For Black or other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Wyze Doorbell V2! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.
