padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 5px;} .contact-info h2 { margin-top: 0; } /* Notes and Disclaimers (Default Background) */ .note { font-size: 0.9em; color: #555; margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Blink Doorbell Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max Door  Compatibility: Blink Video Doorbell ONLY! Fits ONLY: The standard **Blink Video Doorbell** (Wireless or Wired). WILL NOT FIT: Blink Mini, Outdoor/Indoor cameras, or doorbells from other brands (Ring, Nest, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please ensure you have the correct Blink Video Doorbell before ordering. If unsure, send us a picture! Maximum  for Your Blink Doorbell near Brick! Is your Blink Video Doorbell mounted on trim recessed behind brick, and too close to your door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the maximum possible sideways ! It extends your Blink doorbell forward past the brick (select the length needed) using our **Full Offset** design, shifting the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face. Installs easily on trim >= 9/16" wide without drilling into your masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Blink Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to Standard Offset mounts. Ideal when door swing or storm door  is critical. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the Blink Doorbell. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Designed for Blink Video Doorbell: Ensures compatibility with the standard Blink Video Doorbell. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel included (though Blink is typically wireless). Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Blink This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Blink Doorbell backplate/tool. Ensure Blink Doorbell batteries are installed correctly per Blink instructions. Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim (ensure offset provides max ). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Drill pilot holes. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Align the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Blink) onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Blink Backplate: Secure the **backplate that came WITH your Blink Doorbell** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Use correct driver. Do NOT use Blink's wall screws here. Mount Blink Doorbell: Clip your Blink Video Doorbell securely onto **its own backplate** that you just attached to the mount. Final Check: Ensure doorbell is securely mounted and assembly is firm. Follow safety rules & Blink guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws for your wall type. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Optimal Positioning for Enhanced Security The Blink Doorbell Full Offset mount allows you to install your doorbell in a location that maximizes its capabilities, especially when dealing with recessed trim and tight door clearances. This full offset positions your doorbell at the best angle over the brick face for capturing clear video footage. Easy Installation on Trim Installing your Blink doorbell with this mount onto existing trim is straightforward, avoiding complex brick drilling. Detailed instructions and included hardware simplify the DIY process. Durable Construction for Long-lasting Use Crafted from high-quality PETG, the Blink doorbell mount is built to withstand outdoor conditions, ensuring your doorbell remains securely mounted and functional year-round. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the standard Blink Video Doorbell. Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Blink Video Doorbell! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen) Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen) ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen)** model. This is a wired only version. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Image - Click for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: The original Nest Hello (Wired, 1st Gen) or the Nest Doorbell (Battery). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Unsure which Nest model you have? Please send us a picture before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your Nest Doorbell Wired (2nd Gen)! Is your Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen) mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Is your door or storm door swing path extremely close? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** provides the maximum possible sideways  for these tight situations! It extends your Nest doorbell forward past the brick (select the required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, creating essential space next to your door frame. Installs on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. The Nest Doorbell attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This maximizes the horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. This is the perfect solution when maximum  from a door swing or storm door is critical. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure outward like This. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design for ultimate door swing . Tailored Fit: Specifically designed for Google Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen). "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates Nest wiring. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for Nest Wired (Gen 2) This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Screwdrivers/Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your Nest Doorbell's wall plate & release tool. Turn OFF power to doorbell wiring at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max ). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for Nest Wired Gen 2). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided ( #4 screws x 5/16in Flat Head Scrws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach Nest Wall Plate: Secure the **wall plate that came WITH your Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen)** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure it's oriented correctly. Do NOT use Nest's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount Nest Doorbell: Connect wires to the Nest wall plate following Google Nest instructions. Carefully clip the Nest Doorbell onto its wall plate until it clicks securely. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. (Use Nest release tool if removal is needed). Follow safety rules & Google Nest guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. How This Extension Enhances Your Nest Doorbell Perfect Fit for Your Nest Wired (2nd Gen) This brick extension is specifically designed for the Nest Wired Doorbell (2nd Gen), ensuring a seamless and secure fit on brick-adjacent trim. The full offset is ideal for maximizing  and achieving optimal positioning. Easy Installation, Reliable Performance Installing this extension is straightforward onto existing trim, avoiding complex masonry work. Made from durable PETG, it withstands outdoor conditions, ensuring reliable performance and long-lasting protection for your Nest doorbell. Durability You Can Trust Built to last, this extension protects your Nest Doorbell  from the elements while providing a stable mount. Enjoy enhanced security and peace of mind year-round. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen). Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: Black. For other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your Nest Doorbell (Wired, 2nd Gen)! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

margin-top: 20px; border-top: 1px dashed #ccc; padding-top: 15px;} .disclaimer { font-weight: bold; color: #777; } .color-note { margin-top: 15px; } SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro Full Offset Brick Extension Mount | Max  Compatibility: SimpliSafe Video Doorbell Pro ONLY! Fits ONLY: The **SimpliSafe Video Doorbell Pro**. Confirm your model matches the picture below: (Example Images - Click first for Amazon Link. As an Amazon Associate, I earn from qualifying purchases.) WILL NOT FIT: Any other SimpliSafe products or doorbells from other brands (Ring, Nest, Eufy, etc.). Surface Width: Requires mounting surface (trim/molding) to be AT LEAST 9/16 inches wide for the base. Please double-check your SimpliSafe model before ordering! Maximum Door  for Your SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro! Is your SimpliSafe Video Doorbell Pro mounted on trim recessed behind brick? Need maximum  from a tight door swing or storm door? This **Full Offset Brick Extension Mount** is the solution! It extends your SimpliSafe Pro forward past the brick (select required length) and uses our **Full Offset** design to shift the doorbell entirely sideways over the brick face, maximizing space. Installs easily on narrow trim (>= 9/16" wide) without drilling into masonry. How it Works: Full Offset (Maximum Sideways Shift) This mount utilizes our unique FULL OFFSET geometry. Your SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro attaches so its door-facing edge aligns flush with the side edge of the narrow 9/16" mount base. This provides the maximum possible horizontal shift over adjacent brick compared to our Standard Offset mounts. Ideal when maximum  from a door swing or storm door is critical. The offset is reversible for left or right installation. This mount positions the doorbell over or in front of the brick face. Full Offset (This Product) vs Standard Offset: Need standard (less) offset? Click here for the Standard Offset version for the SimpliSafe Pro. Base Dimensions & Mounting: The extension base is 9/16 inches wide (requires >= 9/16" surface). Standard mounting hole spacing is 2.5 inches (center-to-center). Ensure solid mounting on trim. Wall-mounting screws not included. Angled Trim? If your trim is angled, add our Angle Shims (sold separately) for a perpendicular installation. CRITICAL: Measure & Select Your Extension Length! Choose the correct length to clear your brickwork or storm door. Measure carefully: Measure the exact distance straight out from the surface where the mount base will attach (your trim) to the outermost face of your brick or obstacle. Order THIS measurement as your required Extension Length. (Do NOT subtract doorbell thickness for offset mounts). Select the required extension length from the dropdown menu when ordering. (Starts at 1/4 inch). Need help measuring? Text/email a picture! (Contact info below) Measure like this from Trim to Brick Face for Extension Length. Key Features & Benefits: Maximum Sideways Offset: Full Offset design provides ultimate door swing . Tailored for SimpliSafe Pro: Ensures compatibility with the SimpliSafe Video Doorbell Pro. "Over Brick" Placement: Extends doorbell forward past brick and positions it fully over the brick face. Avoid Drilling Brick: Mounts to existing trim (>=9/16" wide, Std. 2.5" hole spacing). Selectable Extension Length: Order the precise depth needed (Trim-to-Brick/Obstacle measurement). Narrow Base (9/16" Std): Designed for tight trim installations. Wire Passthrough: Internal channel accommodates SimpliSafe wiring. Reversible Offset: Base can be flipped for left or right offset. Durable PETG Construction: Strong, weather-resistant plastic. Add-on Compatible: Works with angle shims, fillers etc. (see below). Future-Proof Bracket: Top adapter bracket potentially replaceable for future upgrades (check compatibility). How to Install Your Full Offset Extension for SimpliSafe Pro This mount uses two main printed pieces: the Extension Base and the Doorbell Adapter Bracket. Tools & Prep: Gather: Drill, PH1 & PH2 Philips Bits, Level, Anchors (if needed), your SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro mounting bracket & hardware. Turn OFF power at the breaker! Mount Extension Base: Position the Extension Base (correct length/offset) on trim over wires (ensure Full Offset provides max  needed). Attach securely using appropriate screws (#6 size likely, use PH2) and anchors into the 2.5" spaced holes. Ensure base is level. Don't overtighten. Attach Doorbell Adapter Bracket: Route wires through the Doorbell Adapter Bracket (top piece for SimpliSafe). Align onto Extension Base. Attach using the four small center screws provided (likely #4 screws / PH1 driver). Use correct PH1 bit. Tighten until flush. Check for/clear debris if needed. Do NOT over-torque. Attach SimpliSafe Bracket: Secure the **metal mounting bracket that came WITH your SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro** onto the Doorbell Adapter Bracket using the small screws PROVIDED WITH THIS MOUNT (typically #4 / PH1). Ensure correct orientation. Do NOT use SimpliSafe's long wall screws here. Use correct PH1 driver. Wire & Mount SimpliSafe Pro: Connect wires to the SimpliSafe bracket following SimpliSafe instructions. Slide the SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro unit onto its bracket until it clicks securely. Tighten security screw if applicable. Final Check & Power On: Ensure doorbell is secure. Turn power back on and test. Follow safety rules & SimpliSafe guidelines. Use correct anchors/screws. Correct screwdriver size prevents stripping. Enhance Your Security with the Simplisafe Doorbell Extension Introduction to the Simplisafe Doorbell Brick Extension This Full Offset Brick Extension is designed for homeowners needing to install their SimpliSafe Doorbell Pro securely near brick walls or with tight door clearances. This extension solves common installation challenges by providing flexibility and improved positioning. Benefits of Using the Brick Extension The durable PETG design withstands outdoor conditions, ensuring long-lasting performance. The full offset prevents the doorbell from being obstructed by brick or hit by a door, providing a clear view and enhanced security functionality. Installation Made Simple Installing the Brick Extension is straightforward onto existing trim. Mount the base, attach the adapter, select your length, and mount your SimpliSafe bracket using the included hardware and instructions for a hassle-free setup. Optional Add-ons & Accessories: Further customize your installation: Angle Shims (5°, 10°, 15°) Corrects for angled trim *under the Extension Base*. Horizontal Angle Adapter or Swivel Add-on Add horizontal angle adjustment to the end of the extension. Bottom Filler Spacer Plate Fills the gap below the extension base on angled/uneven trim. Body Shim Filler Plate Fills gaps between the extension body and uneven brick. Add Side Wire Entry Adds side entry holes ("mouse holes") to the *Extension Base* (add service to cart). Wire Extension Kit Need longer wires? Purchase our extension wire kit with your choice of connectors. Custom Color Standard color is White (Matches SimpliSafe). Add this service for Black or other colors. Product Examples (See listing photos for details or contact us for more examples!) Need Help? Confirm Compatibility & Measurements! Ensure you have the SimpliSafe Video Doorbell Pro. Need help measuring extension length or choosing Full vs Standard Offset? Email: shop@doorbellmount.com (Send Pictures!) Text/Call: 1-833-326-6868 (Text Pictures!) Standard Color: White (to match SimpliSafe). For Black or other colors, add the Color Change Request item. Doorbell Not Included. Includes the 2-piece extension mount (Extension Base + Doorbell Adapter Bracket) and necessary assembly screws. PETG Material: Printed in durable, outdoor-rated PETG. 3D Printed Quality: Minor cosmetic variations inherent to 3D printing may exist but do not affect function. Contact us with quality concerns before reviewing. Order the Full Offset Brick Extension for maximum  with your SimpliSafe Video Doorbell Pro! Remember to measure carefully (Trim to Brick Face!) and select your required extension length.

- [Hello Spring Outdoor Doormat](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/hello-spring-outdoor-doormat): Our Hello Spring Outdoor Doormat is the perfect way to create an inviting springtime entry way! We partnered with the AH-Mazing Shelly Kim of Letters by Shells to create this design as part of our first ever 'artist line' of welcome mats! Product Overview The perfect doormat for a warm, bright spring theme. An affordable, ideal housewarming gift for newlyweds or your friends. Available in 4 sizes; Small 16x24 inches, Standard size 18 x 30 inches, Oversized 24x36 inches and Large 24x48 inches to fit most doors. Mats are .65 inches thick. Hand made in the USA from natural coir fibers for mold, mildew resistance. Extra durable, thick vinyl backing ensures no dangerous slippage when used. All our doormats are tan/natural brown in color. The natural coir fibers of the doormat are from natural coconut husks which are mildew resistant and have an extra-sturdy, thick vinyl backing to help keep them in place. Care Info: Though we use all weather paints and a UV sealant to ensure that your mat is perfect for your doorstep, we suggest that you keep your mat as dry as possible to avoid darkening of the fibers. To clean, simply shake out…easy as that! PLEASE READ: We do our best to hand paint, process and ship standard orders as quickly as possible, and our current production time is 5-7 business days.

- [Cream and Grey Striped Accent Rug - 24x36 inches](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/cream-and-grey-striped-accent-rug-24x36-inches): The warm, inviting look of our Cream and Grey Striped Rug will instantly bring modern appeal and classic design to your indoor or outdoor space. It features alternating stripes in grey-blue and white hues that offer a textured place for guests to step. This 2x3 foot rug would look great in a living room, bedroom, dining room or even layered under a doormat on an outdoor patio! Product Overview The perfect entryway rug for a warm, bold décor theme. Pair with a Nickel Designs doormat for a trendy entryway! Standard size, 24 x 36 inches to fit most doors. 45% cotton | 45% polyester | 10% viscose. Machine wash cold/gentle and lay to dry. Hemmed edges for lasting use. Recommended to use a rug pad, sold separately.

- [Asshole Free Zone Rude Doormat](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/products/asshole-free-zone-rude-doormat): Put your foot down with this funny doormat. This outdoor doormat makes it clear that you don't tolerate rude guests. Say it with a smile - this very unique, custom made, indoor/outdoor door mat for your home or business is definitely a conversation starter! Product Overview The perfect doormat for a bold, funny theme. Create a funny, personalized entry way for your home. Select from multiple color options to create your own unique doormat. Standard size, 18 x 30 inches to fit most doors. Hand painted in the USA from natural coir fibers for mold, mildew resistance. Extra durable, thick vinyl backing ensures no dangerous slippage when used. Permanent paint and UV sealant protects your custom doormat from the elements. Shop our layering rugs here! The natural coir fibers of the doormat are from natural coconut husks which are mildew resistant and have an extra-sturdy, thick vinyl backing to help keep them in place. All of our doormats are tan/natural brown in color. The natural coir fibers of the doormat are from the husk of the coconut which is mold and mildew resistant and have an extra-sturdy, thick vinyl backing to ensure they won’t slide around, no matter the surface. Though we use all weather paints and a UV sealant to ensure that your mat is perfect for your doorstep, we suggest that you keep your mat as dry as possible to avoid darkening of the fibers. To clean, simply shake out…easy as that! PLEASE READ: We do our best to hand paint, process and ship standard orders as quickly as possible, and our current production time is 1-2 WEEKS (14 days) for standard orders and 3-4 weeks (28 days) for custom orders.

  - [The Hidden Downsides of Storm Doors: What You Need to Know](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/blogs/news/the-hidden-downsides-of-storm-doors-what-you-need-to-know): <p>Storm doors offer extra protection, energy efficiency, and ventilation, but they also come with downsides. In this post, you’ll learn about common issues like heat buildup that can damage your entry door, added maintenance, potential moisture problems, and the inconvenience of managing two doors. We’ll also discuss how storm doors can impact curb appeal and when they may not be the best choice for your home.</p>
    Updated: 2025-02-28T18:00:08Z
    Author: Daniel Adema
  - [Here's the Average Cost of a Professional Storm Door Installation](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/blogs/news/heres-the-average-cost-of-a-professional-storm-door-installation): <p>The cost to install a storm door typically ranges between <strong data-start="73" data-end="90">$300 and $600</strong> for professional installation. While some installers may offer lower prices, going below this range can lead to rushed or subpar work. The total cost depends on the type of storm door, materials, and labor. Basic models start at <strong data-start="320" data-end="336">$100 to $300</strong>, while premium storm doors with custom features can exceed <strong data-start="396" data-end="404">$700</strong>. This post breaks down what impacts the price and how to ensure you get quality installation for your money.</p>
    Updated: 2025-03-08T02:30:01Z
    Author: Daniel Adema
  - [What’s the Point of a Storm Door?](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/blogs/news/what-s-the-point-of-a-storm-door): <p data-start="0" data-end="453">A storm door adds an extra layer of protection, energy efficiency, and convenience to your home. It shields your main door from harsh weather, improves insulation, and allows for ventilation without letting in bugs or debris. Storm doors also enhance security, provide natural light, and extend the life of your entry door. In this post, we’ll explore the key benefits of storm doors and why they might be a smart addition to your home.</p>
    Updated: 2025-03-14T18:00:10Z
    Author: Daniel Adema
  - [When Should You Not Use a Storm Door?](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/blogs/news/when-should-you-not-use-a-storm-door): <p>While storm doors offer protection, energy efficiency, and ventilation, they aren’t always the right choice for every home. You may want to avoid installing a storm door if your entryway gets excessive sunlight, as trapped heat can damage your main door. Storm doors may also be unnecessary if your front door is already well-insulated, if your home has limited space for door , or if you live in a mild climate where extra weather protection isn’t needed. In this post, we’ll cover when a storm door may not be the best option for your home.</p>

  - [Can I install a storm door myself?](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/blogs/news/can-i-install-a-storm-door-myself): <p>Yes, you can install a storm door yourself if you have basic tools and handyman skills.   - [Should a storm door be the same size as the door?](https://www.stormdoorguy.com/blogs/news/should-a-storm-door-be-the-same-size-as-the-door): <p>A storm door should match the height and width of your existing entry door frame, but it’s not always the same exact size as your main door.
